name: Jim Inhofe
subject: ELECTION INTEGRITY ALERT: 75% of Americans DEMAND Voter ID.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | Voter ID should NOT be controversial! |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/1H9H6PTBwKyGUJICOrfCt/wv)
---|---
| | | [ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15KdMDanCcc8So1c61V5xcg4)
---
| | [🚨 **BREAKING: 75% OF AMERICANS DEMAND VOTER ID** 🚨](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15Ke97hXRAH8H02gXYuSIlmd) ** ** ****Secure elections mean fair elections****—****that is a lesson Democrats have either failed to learn or have purposefully chosen to ignore****—****though we all know it’s the latter. **** ** ** [****DEMAND VOTER ID****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15KevBpy6Zc8vC3lPV4FTusm)
**While Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer argue that popular opinion is in their court on voter ID, recent polling shows that**a WHOPPING 75% of ALL Americans believe voter ID will secure elections, combat fraud and ensure fair elections.**** ** ** ****Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are constantly working to ram through legislation which destroys election integrity by removing states’ ability to run their own elections.** We cannot allow that to happen!** ** ** [****DEMAND VOTER ID****](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15KeS5x8mnH8ke4qHREt4Dyv) ** ** **Ensuring that each and every voter must present an ID at the ballot box is a simple, and effective means of securing our elections.**[_**Click HERE if you agree!**_](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/15KfezEIBMc88Q5vzOegfMEE) ** ** ** Thank you for your support,** ** ** **Jim Inhofe**

---
| | |
###### PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
---
###### PO Box 13300

Oklahoma City, OK 73113

Derek, we’ve got some troubling news: **Virginia was just rated a TOSS-UP by _The Cook Political Report.__And_ _it's_ _October already._**

They _**downgraded**_ Democrats' chances of winning, and they’re giving extremist Trump Republicans a 50-50 shot at winning the Virginia Governor’s office.

This is the most important race of 2021, and it’s going to set the stage for not just the 2022 midterms but for Donald Trump’s attempt at a comeback in 2024.

clean_body: | | | Derek, we’ve got some troubling news: Virginia was just rated a TOSS-UP by The Cook Political Report.And it's October already. They downgraded Democrats' chances of winning, and they’re giving extremist Trump Republicans a 50-50 shot at winning the Virginia Governor’s office. This is the most important race of 2021, and it’s going to set the stage for not just the 2022 midterms but for Donald Trump’s attempt at a comeback in 2024. We can’t let Virginia fall, Derek, but with Virginians headed to the polls right now and Election Day in just over two weeks, that looks more possible every single day. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . subject: Peter
body:
Next year's midterm and state elections will be about creating a better future for Hoosier families and bringing a more balanced government back to the Hoosier State Peter, **that's why it's such a****privilege**** to have Hoosier voters like you in this fight with Indiana Democrats.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643927/312027265/624230061?refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) When I was elected Chair of the Indiana Democratic Party, I was ready to hit the ground running by starting a grassroots organizing plan for communities across the state. The goal has been to meet Hoosiers where they are and show them how Democrats are delivering better opportunities for their families. Indiana Democrats have worked toward this goal by having the American Rescue Plan Tour, the American Jobs Plan Tour, and the Redistricting Tour **\- with more to come in a couple of weeks. **I also wanted to reach Hoosiers across the state by expanding our party's digital presence, which we achieved in a few short months. [**LEARN MORE ABOUT HOW I CAN JOIN THE FIGHT**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643929/312027266/624230061?refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) **Most importantly:** The Party is in the process of recruiting and training next year's candidates while using an Indiana-specific strategy to elect Democrats up-and-down the ballot. I want to achieve all of this because it's time our state government solves the dire problems that Hoosiers face every day. This includes creating jobs that provide livable wages for our workers, revitalizing Indiana's crumbling infrastructure, and ending the outsized influence of the Republican supermajority that has proven to put its extreme partisanship ahead of Indiana's future. **The Indiana Democratic Party is working overtime to make this reality possible, and we're ready to deliver for Hoosiers in every Zip code. ** [**Can you join me today and support Indiana Democrats with a donation? Chipping in $10, $25, or anything at all will help us help candidates run the strongest campaigns we can against Indiana Republicans. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643933/312027268/624230061?refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) This is a multi-year strategic plan, and it will take the hard work and dedication of grassroots supporters like you to help Democrats break the Republican supermajority in the statehouse and start the process of bringing balance to our government once more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643935/312027271/624230061?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643939/312027277/624230061?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643945/312027281/624230061?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643947/312027282/624230061?express_lane_other=true&refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) Hoosiers - no matter how they vote - are ready for this fresh vision. They are ready for leaders who are ready to step up and offer all Hoosiers a better life in all 92 counties. I'm ready to keep working, and look forward to helping to elect great Democrats up-and-down the ballot as we enter a new chapter in our state politics. I know we can create a brighter future for Hoosiers if we get to work, organize, and accomplish this all together. [**So, Peter, can you donate today to help Indiana Democrats defeat the INGOP? Indiana Democrats are relying on yours grassroots support. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37643949/312027284/624230061?refcode=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.=HoosierPlan.FR.10.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzEzMGZhMS0wMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL4B7N2NnELQknXuE8_oktUfItUmg6945lu5ifa9lSE=) In Solidarity, Mike Schmuhl Chair Indiana Democratic Party Indiana Democratic Party

At Latinos for America First we are staying busy around the country speaking about the truth and educating our communities about the importance of life, liberty, and freedom coupled with the love for GOD and FAMILY. Join us around the country from Texas to Utah to Arizona and Florida. We must reject the communist agenda that is being placed upon us everyday. Stand with US, come learn how to get involved, and how to make a difference in taking YOUR country back! Visit any of the links below for more information on any of the events. Hope to see you soon. name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Honored Roswell veteran Roger Wise Jr: Jake will fight for American strength
body:
Roger Wise Jr. endorses Jake Evans for the 6th District.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Oct. 18, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Honored Roswell veteran Roger Wise Jr: Jake will fight for American strength
Longtime north Fulton community leader and Georgia Military Veterans' Hall of Fame member Roger Wise Jr. has endorsed Jake Evans in his run for the 6th Congressional District. "I have proudly served our nation in uniform. I know firsthand the importance of American military strength when it comes to keeping our homeland safe and preserving the peace," Wise said. "Jake will invest in our armed forces and stand up for our troops. Our district needs a voice like that representing us in Congress, as opposed to an unquestioning vote of support for the current administration. Jake offers us the change we sorely need." Wise and his wife have lived in Roswell for nearly 40 years. He's chaired the Fulton County Housing Authority and the Fulton County Planning and Zoning Committee. He's a longtime leader in the American Legion and Roswell Rotary. "Roger Wise is a pillar in the Roswell community and a great Georgian," Jake said. "Baylie and I are humbled that someone so respected in this community has put his faith and trust in us. We won't let him or the people down."
---

subject: Sinema flips on climate science, wants to cut $100 billion from Dem plan

body:
|
---

| | Peter, Kyrsten Sinema's erratic behavior is a serious threat to the Democratic Party. A climatologist from Sinema's home state of Arizona told _The New York Times_ simply: “We need the funding.” He added that “Many communities in Arizona lack the budget or expertise to do this. It requires real money. And it's super important for Arizona.” A month ago Kyrsten Sinema seemingly agreed. She told _The Arizona Republic_ that “We know that a changing climate costs Arizonans. And right now, we have the opportunity to pass smart policies to address it — looking forward to that.” However now Sinema wants to gut at least $100 billion in major progressive climate change funding. We are doing everything we can to persuade Sinema to stand with the Democratic majority and pass historic climate change legislation, because this may be our last opportunity before the climate warms beyond repair. If the chorus is loud enough, she'll have no choice but to do what's right for the future of the planet. But right now, we're still $1,301 short from hitting this week's vital fundraising deadline. Please, we're reaching out to you personally. You worked so hard to make sure that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris defeated Donald Trump in 2020 and that real Senate champions like Raphael Warnock could give us a 50/50 Senate that would be an engine for real change. And now, we need you to help us give progressives in Arizona and across the country the tools they need to remind Kyrsten Sinema what a real Democrat looks like with a powerful grassroots pressure campaign. body:
This is our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue...
| | |
---
Peter – Sen. Grassley (R-IA) just recently announced that he's running for an EIGHTH term. During his four decades in office, he's been awful for working Iowans: choosing Big Pharma over our seniors, Wall Street over working families and corporate monopolies over small businesses. **Now, Iowans are ready for new leadership: Nearly two-thirds of voters say they don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley.**
Right now, Sen. Grassley is more vulnerable than ever, and Democrat Abby Finkenauer is running to defeat him and protect our slim Senate majority. This is our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue, but the GOP Senate campaign arm has already raked in $76 MILLION to stop Democratic challengers like Abby and take back the Senate – at any cost.

name: Tyler Harper for Georgia
subject: TYLER HARPER'S OCILLA ROOTS, PLANS AS AG COMMISSIONER PROFILED BY AJC
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 18, 2021
---
| TYLER HARPER'S OCILLA ROOTS, PLANS AS AG COMMISSIONER PROFILED BY ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION
---
| OCILLA - In case you missed it, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution featured a [column in Sunday's newspaper](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JJEKumrNYh7uK29P9W9XkSW09_6RIFQ4s_DXs591WNC4nOQbcqFqfRYcjtoi3CFuEfQMFiknP5FXZ6xRCiFKKLjoz_g-YuLowG4TxdKwWt-Q42kMUgUNPk2Cp-F2cTJmX54gmx5k-Wg1m6ddP363lTxxvq-hfqOllR1T98KJiwbtTfpFErKLfFyo-gq963G6vVAQUwlai6aM9lSiCmGSEvI1rd0n7_Sejg57REFQNmcKVn79XutjtQo-21n4NSRGp1vmKMlzW00=&c=58pbtA9AS_v7WNfi-ugEhqM0poFNEC0FWnoiLnggoaaKcKQASKmFhA==&ch=UtjHqF331JXCtbnB3xbclvh3rkXbXVN-4PX5ZhlFZ0ZRIkPyCx_ttw==) discussing Georgia's agriculture industry and Tyler Harper's campaign to become the next Commissioner of Agriculture. The story discusses Tyler's homegrown roots in Ocilla, his background and experience as a seventh-generation farmer, and his plans to tackle the challenges and opportunities facing our state's number one industry.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JJEKumrNYh7uK29P9W9XkSW09_6RIFQ4s_DXs591WNC4nOQbcqFqfRYcjtoi3CFuEfQMFiknP5FXZ6xRCiFKKLjoz_g-YuLowG4TxdKwWt-Q42kMUgUNPk2Cp-F2cTJmX54gmx5k-Wg1m6ddP363lTxxvq-hfqOllR1T98KJiwbtTfpFErKLfFyo-gq963G6vVAQUwlai6aM9lSiCmGSEvI1rd0n7_Sejg57REFQNmcKVn79XutjtQo-21n4NSRGp1vmKMlzW00=&c=58pbtA9AS_v7WNfi-ugEhqM0poFNEC0FWnoiLnggoaaKcKQASKmFhA==&ch=UtjHqF331JXCtbnB3xbclvh3rkXbXVN-4PX5ZhlFZ0ZRIkPyCx_ttw==) or read below for the full article:
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Ga.'s No. 1 industry has a No. 1 need: More people
If Georgia's agriculture industry had more Tyler Harpers, its biggest challenge -- a critical shortage of people -- would melt away.
Harper grew up on his family's Ocilla farm in South Georgia, studied agricultural engineering at the University of Georgia and had his first cotton crop in the dirt by the time he was a senior in college.
Harper is one of a handful of full-time farmers in the Georgia Senate that was once dominated by them. And he's running to become the state agriculture commissioner in 2022.
Unlike the kids who who grew up in a small town and always wanted to leave, Harper finished at UGA and moved straight home to his family's growing farming operation. "As a kid, anytime I got on tractors I was happy. Even my toys were tractors," he said. "I remember growing up in our house, I'd lay them all out and the carpet became the farm."
I went to see Harper in Ocilla as a final part of my Georgia politics road trip. You can't write about politics without writing about the state's No. 1 industry.
While farming in the state accounts for about $15 billion in annual output, it also throws off $60 billion of additional economic activity for related business at every link in the chain -- from seed and soil research to equipment manufacturing, processing, storage, trucking and, in many cases, export through Georgia's ports.
One out of seven jobs in the state is tied to the agriculture industry, but there's a disconnect between metro Atlantans' understanding of the basics of farming and its massive role in the state economy.
It's part of what's led to the Atlanta-and-not-Atlanta political dynamic in the state. And part of why Harper works to educate his fellow members of the General Assembly on what rural Georgia needs whenever he has a chance.
"Our No. 1 industry in Georgia is a lot of the reason we're the No. 1 state to do business," he said. "A lot of businesses and industries here are tied to agriculture."
Like many farmers, Harper and his family grow a variety of crops -- including peanuts, cotton, and timber -- and raise cattle, in part to diversify the business and spread out the risk. A bad year for one can be saved by a good year for another. On the day I visited, Harper was harvesting a 300-acre plot of peanuts. It was our third try to find a day dry enough to pick the peanuts up off the ground, since damp shells turn harvesting machinery into a gummy mess.
Along with the unknowns of the weather and potential natural disasters, working as a farmer in Georgia seems to be an exercise in managing market demands and juggling other unpredictables, like fuel prices, costs for seed and grain, available labor and even international tariffs.
"Any one day, a farmer in Georgia is a commodity market specialist, a veterinarian, a computer technology expert and a plant scientist, all of that before 9:30 in the morning," Agriculture Commissioner Gary Black told me in a phone call from the campaign trail. He's also running in 2022, but for United State Senate.
Harper's family's farm, where he, his parents and his brother's family live, is larger than most, about 2,000 acres in Irwin County. The family's trim homes, including his grandmother's, dot the property.
About 90% of farms in the state are family-owned, he said. According to the Georgia Farm Bureau, the average farm in the state is about 230 acres.
"When you drive by a cattle farm, or a peanut field, or a corn field or a cotton field, there's a family tied to that in some way," he said over lunch at Hutto's BBQ. "And more than likely it's a family operation."
Along with the physical demands of most farm jobs, Harper pointed to a labor shortage across the state, a lack of broadband access and a need for better access to capital as the three biggest challenges for rural Georgia.
"It's about human capital, because we've got to continue to have a reliable workforce in the ag industry," he said.
A study published in June by the state showed 500,000-plus homes and businesses without internet access. It shows huge swaths of Georgia, including Harper's own home, with no reliable connection.
"Most of your agricultural production businesses are not located in the city, and they need to make sure that they have access to markets," he said. "And to get access to those markets, they have internet access."
Easier access to loans is also crucial, he said, both to begin a farming business and to recover from a bad crop or natural disaster.
When I asked Black about the three biggest issues facing farmers in Georgia, he had one.
"There's labor, labor and labor," he said.
Bryan Tolar, a longtime agriculture lobbyist at the state Capitol, agreed. In addition to a shortage of people to work on farms, Tolar described a chronic labor shortage in related businesses like warehousing, transportation and processing.
A strong economy in urban areas, depopulation in rural Georgia, and strict limits on immigration are combining to make simply finding workers harder than ever.
"We have terrific soils, terrific climate," Tolar said. "If we just had people, it would be magnificent."
For Harper, strengthening rural Georgia, including educating the next generation of agricultural workers for the state, is a big piece of why he says he wants to be the next commissioner of agriculture after Black leaves his post at the end of next year.
"I love agriculture. I love the industry," he said, driving past rows of puffy cotton perched atop shrubs and nearly ready defoliation and then harvest.
"It's who I am, what I am, and what I do."
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 18, 2021 | TYLER HARPER'S OCILLA ROOTS, PLANS AS AG COMMISSIONER PROFILED BY ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION | OCILLA - In case you missed it, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution featured a == discussing Georgia's agriculture industry and Tyler Harper's campaign to become the next Commissioner of Agriculture. The story discusses Tyler's homegrown roots in Ocilla, his background and experience as a seventh-generation farmer, and his plans to tackle the challenges and opportunities facing our state's number one industry. Click == or read below for the full article: | | | | Ga.'s No. 1 industry has a No. 1 need: More people If Georgia's agriculture industry had more Tyler Harpers, its biggest challenge -- a critical shortage of people -- would melt away. Harper grew up on his family's Ocilla farm in South Georgia, studied agricultural engineering at the University of Georgia and had his first cotton crop in the dirt by the time he was a senior in college. Harper is one of a handful of full-time farmers in the Georgia Senate that was once dominated by them. And he's running to become the state agriculture commissioner in 2022. Unlike the kids who who grew up in a small town and always wanted to leave, Harper finished at UGA and moved straight home to his family's growing farming operation. "As a kid, anytime I got on tractors I was happy. Even my toys were tractors," he said. "I remember growing up in our house, I'd lay them all out and the carpet became the farm." I went to see Harper in Ocilla as a final part of my Georgia politics road trip. You can't write about politics without writing about the state's No. 1 industry. While farming in the state accounts for about $15 billion in annual output, it also throws off $60 billion of additional economic activity for related business at every link in the chain -- from seed and soil research to equipment manufacturing, processing, storage, trucking and, in many cases, export through Georgia's ports. One out of seven jobs in the state is tied to the agriculture industry, but there's a disconnect between metro Atlantans' understanding of the basics of farming and its massive role in the state economy. It's part of what's led to the Atlanta-and-not-Atlanta political dynamic in the state. And part of why Harper works to educate his fellow members of the General Assembly on what rural Georgia needs whenever he has a chance. "Our No. 1 industry in Georgia is a lot of the reason we're the No. 1 state to do business," he said. "A lot of businesses and industries here are tied to agriculture." Like many farmers, Harper and his family grow a variety of crops -- including peanuts, cotton, and timber -- and raise cattle, in part to diversify the business and spread out the risk. A bad year for one can be saved by a good year for another. On the day I visited, Harper was harvesting a 300-acre plot of peanuts. It was our third try to find a day dry enough to pick the peanuts up off the ground, since damp shells turn harvesting machinery into a gummy mess. Along with the unknowns of the weather and potential natural disasters, working as a farmer in Georgia seems to be an exercise in managing market demands and juggling other unpredictables, like fuel prices, costs for seed and grain, available labor and even international tariffs. "Any one day, a farmer in Georgia is a commodity market specialist, a veterinarian, a computer technology expert and a plant scientist, all of that before 9:30 in the morning," Agriculture Commissioner Gary Black told me in a phone call from the campaign trail. He's also running in 2022, but for United State Senate. Harper's family's farm, where he, his parents and his brother's family live, is larger than most, about 2,000 acres in Irwin County. The family's trim homes, including his grandmother's, dot the property. About 90% of farms in the state are family-owned, he said. According to the Georgia Farm Bureau, the average farm in the state is about 230 acres. "When you drive by a cattle farm, or a peanut field, or a corn field or a cotton field, there's a family tied to that in some way," he said over lunch at Hutto's BBQ. "And more than likely it's a family operation." Along with the physical demands of most farm jobs, Harper pointed to a labor shortage across the state, a lack of broadband access and a need for better access to capital as the three biggest challenges for rural Georgia. "It's about human capital, because we've got to continue to have a reliable workforce in the ag industry," he said. A study published in June by the state showed 500,000-plus homes and businesses without internet access. It shows huge swaths of Georgia, including Harper's own home, with no reliable connection. "Most of your agricultural production businesses are not located in the city, and they need to make sure that they have access to markets," he said. "And to get access to those markets, they have internet access." Easier access to loans is also crucial, he said, both to begin a farming business and to recover from a bad crop or natural disaster. When I asked Black about the three biggest issues facing farmers in Georgia, he had one. "There's labor, labor and labor," he said. Bryan Tolar, a longtime agriculture lobbyist at the state Capitol, agreed. In addition to a shortage of people to work on farms, Tolar described a chronic labor shortage in related businesses like warehousing, transportation and processing. A strong economy in urban areas, depopulation in rural Georgia, and strict limits on immigration are combining to make simply finding workers harder than ever. "We have terrific soils, terrific climate," Tolar said. "If we just had people, it would be magnificent." For Harper, strengthening rural Georgia, including educating the next generation of agricultural workers for the state, is a big piece of why he says he wants to be the next commissioner of agriculture after Black leaves his post at the end of next year. "I love agriculture. I love the industry," he said, driving past rows of puffy cotton perched atop shrubs and nearly ready defoliation and then harvest. "It's who I am, what I am, and what I do." | | | | Visit www.tylerharperga.com to stay up to date with the campaign, sign up to volunteer, and donate. Follow along on Tyler's campaign for Agriculture Commissioner on ==, ==, and ==. | | | | | | == | == == == | | Tyler Harper for Georgia | PO Box 798, Ocilla, GA 31774 | | Sent by mailto:press@tylerharperga.com powered by

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Asking for a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This is an important moment for our campaign. A lot is happening and I could use your help. Let me quickly explain:

Over the past few months, I have traveled across the state to meet Wisconsinites where they’re at and discuss the kitchen table issues that matter most in their communities. These meaningful conversations are critical to shaping our campaign platform, and they help us create an agenda that is actually tailored to our state.

While I have been out on the road listening to Wisconsin workers and families, Ron Johnson has been ignoring the folks who keep our state moving forward -- just like he always does. The guy is too busy spreading dangerous conspiracy theories and cozying up to his corporate backers to give a damn about the challenges Wisconsinites are facing. He recently made a bogus claim that **"...hospital overcrowding in Wisconsin due to COVID-19 is no worse than what happens during 'a bad flu season.'"**

Ron Johnson has got to go. _CNN_ is already calling him the most vulnerable Republican senator up next year and _The Cook Political Report_ rated this race a "toss-up." Wisconsin's U.S. Senate race will be a coin flip, and it could determine whether or not Democrats can keep the majority or hand the keys back to Mitch McConnell.

Here comes the part where I could use your help: I have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. If we're going to defeat Ron Johnson and flip this seat blue, we need a surge of online grassroots donors to chip in and support this campaign. Every dollar will make a difference, especially now.

[**Our digital fundraising has slowed down this month, but we're not too far behind for October. If a few more people chipped in today, we could make up for this temporary lapse pretty quickly. A donation of any amount will go a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37657375/312067627/-1146540901?refcode=em21_211017_mm5_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211017_mm5_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmViYTM2Zi0yMjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52YDo7_jcWqnzGFXu2aP_0MWERTQOx8rY9qYRC9vAe8=)

I can't tell you how significant that is in these critical early months. We can't let Ron Johnson, Mitch McConnell, and their allies win in 2022. With your help, I know we can stop them.

Thanks for everything.

— Sarah Godlewski

clean_body: | | | id:2021-10-04-13:33:31:048t ~~ Patriot, In 2016, Evan McMullin ran against President Trump. In 2020, he helped elect Joe Biden. And now,Evan McMullin has officially announced that he’s making an “independent” run against me! There’s no doubt he’ll have the same group of anti-conservatives backing him this time in his latest bid for office. There are reports that McMullin has close ties to the Lincoln Project, and we can assume they will be spending MILLIONS to prop him up in this race to defeat me. We have our hands full in this race, with a contested Republican primary and now McMullin attempting to play the role of spoiler in the general election. It’s vital that we build up our resources NOW for the battle ahead... Evan McMullin won’t admit it, but we know what he wants to achieve. This guy wants to DESTROY the Republican Party... he’d love to keep the U.S. Senate in Chuck Schumer’s hands, and you know he’s going to have Democrats and Never Trump Republicans across America rallying behind him. Our great nation's future is on the line in 2022. Our liberty hangs in the balance. We need to rally Utah Republicans behind my campaign like never before to WIN THIS RACE and TAKE BACK the Senate next November. name: Citizens for Turner
subject: More Jobs, Less Taxes, Are you in?
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, Despite the turmoil and challenges of the past year, **the Miami Valley continues to grow** and find new paths to success. I’m proud of my hometown and what we have accomplished together. With your continued financial support, we can keep our community strong. Dayton was recently named the **top U.S. city for tech growth** , a top twenty city for job seekers, and a top twenty city for college graduates.
---
| | | | | [Support Mike's work in Congress!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008522&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner%3Fexitintent%3Dtrue&cf=64880&v=0dd0640c9bc3414f24c1f5ea321718bc8c22e81e16898c3347b3406ba80aa1b4)
---
| | | | This acknowledgement is a reflection of the hard work, resiliency, and ingenuity of our workers and businesses.
* **I have fought to support our families,** and the businesses that employ them, and**** to grow our local economy.
* In the height of COVID, I fought to protect our small businesses with programs like the **Paycheck Protection Program and the RESTART Act**.
* During my time in Congress, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base has added **more than** **10,000 jobs** and continues to help drive our local economy.

I will continue to fight against raising taxes and rampant inflation that threaten our prosperity.
---
| | | | | [I LIKE MIKE!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008522&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner%3Fexitintent%3Dtrue&cf=64880&v=0dd0640c9bc3414f24c1f5ea321718bc8c22e81e16898c3347b3406ba80aa1b4)
---
| | | | I hope I can count on your continued support. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---

This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **email@miketurner.com**

120 W. 2nd StreetSuite 1510
Dayton, OH 45402

name: James Carville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37658274/312073484/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjgwN2MzMC0yNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_fMV23pbYTMjljAN5KMqsPJ15QJjwDz_EBeIr3tKhiY=)
Friends — Sorry to bother you on a Monday, folks, but I just heard back from my friends over at Defend the Senate and wanted to give you an update on their October fundraising goal. **It sounds like after this weekend we’re closing in on our October fundraising goal, but we still need about $4,500 today to stay on track.** It shouldn’t come as a surprise that hitting this month’s goal is critical to Democrats’ long-term success. Every grassroots donation we receive goes directly towards powering our mission to protect and grow Democratic power in the U.S. Senate. Grassroots supporters helped us flip the Senate by winning in states like Arizona and Georgia and we are counting on you once again to help make all the difference as we look towards 2022. It sounds like after this weekend we’re closing in on our October fundraising goal, but we still need about $4,500 today to stay on track. It shouldn’t come as a surprise that hitting this month’s goal is critical to Democrats’ long-term success. Every grassroots donation we receive goes directly towards powering our mission to protect and grow Democratic power in the U.S. Senate. Grassroots supporters helped us flip the Senate by winning in states like Arizona and Georgia and we are counting on you once again to help make all the difference as we look towards 2022. Peter,

Since we’ve launched this campaign to take down Ron Johnson, I’ve been traveling across the country talking to Wisconsinites about the issues that matter most.

Throughout my tour of Wisconsin, I’ve had the chance to sit down with union leaders and organizations, and I’m proud to have received the endorsements of IATSE Local 18, IBEW Local 494, Teamsters Joint Council 39, and now IUOE Local 139. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659341/312078838/-1337061357?refcode=EM_FR_211018union_N_AL_90DA_6_G_N_PT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzE3ZWQ0Ni0yYTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CiVsQLhgtrKR08epcmT4EyAhtbW_afAz_4PJ8O7xtGc=) We are building a large movement that has at its heart Wisconsin's working people. I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again, if you’re pro-worker, you’re pro, PRO Act. Ron Johnson doesn’t seem to think so, though -- that’s why I’m taking him on.

| | Team —

As you probably know, before running for US Senate, Tom was busy protecting jobs and building partnerships between local governments and unions. He tells the story of saving the Appleton Coated paper mill as the County Executive of Outagamie County in his critically acclaimed book, _One Day Stronger._

Tom will be participating in a virtual conversation with Anne-Marie Slaughter, the CEO of New America, as they discuss the story behind his book and what it means for all of us.

And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659554/312079908/1927938479?refcode=20211018_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGM1OS0yYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNeXqOgktqMotkNdvz9iThjSSvhiO_Ah-Hx271sWBtc=)
Friends — I have an important ask to make, and Seth Moulton said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: [**If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659555/312079917/1927938479?refcode=20211018_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGM1OS0yYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNeXqOgktqMotkNdvz9iThjSSvhiO_Ah-Hx271sWBtc=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659556/312079934/-1534947712?refcode=20211018_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGM1OS0yYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNeXqOgktqMotkNdvz9iThjSSvhiO_Ah-Hx271sWBtc=)
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, —Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659557/312079935/-1534947712?refcode=20211018_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmRjOGM1OS0yYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNeXqOgktqMotkNdvz9iThjSSvhiO_Ah-Hx271sWBtc=)

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Today is the last day to register to vote before Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Are you registered to vote?

You have until today - Monday, October 18 - to register so that you can cast your ballot in the November 2 election.

Keystone Progress is mobilizing the vote around PA -- especially in areas often overlooked by organizers. We know how important it is to reach out to every voter and to make sure that each of their votes count.

Voting in local and state elections is CRITICAL to the success of our democracy. As we saw in the last presidential election, when lawmakers intent on undermining our fair elections tried to come for our votes, it was Pennsylvania’s elected state judges who upheld the integrity of our democracy.

Please register to vote here. [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/VoterRegistrationApplication.aspx]

And remember:

You haven’t registered until your application is processed and accepted by your county voter registration office.

Make sure to fill out all fields in the application with a red indicator or an asterisk (*). If you have a PA driver's license or PennDOT ID, use it as a reference when you complete the application.

You can submit your application on this website [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/VoterRegistrationApplication.aspx] .

You can also hand-deliver it or mail it to your county voter registration office but it must be received by end-of-day today, Monday, Oct. 18. Click here to download a blank voter registration form [https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/pages/VoterRegistrationApplication.aspx] .

If you are on active duty in the military, or you are a hospitalized or bedridden veteran, click here [https://www.fvap.gov/] to register at any time.

And if you want to help us organize to Get Out The Vote, please sign up to VOLUNTEER [https://secure.everyaction.com/uzGCPSTbqE-PPaK8Nmgqjw2?contactdata=ZmPcWRJNSFG8Q5lu5mUWXp1dgxj0iI1NSX%2B7SzBYBDFdMUTy4cGLJF%2BNc3Cq9%2Fa0pYT8acQipOx6jfiumKeeVlCv1pzAwaU%2Ff%2BRyx5dKZ%2FRdb250eeVluWp98Yn98fOf%2FVuCrrTXNRsApD%2FM1%2FLyDQ%3D%3D] or DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=101821] to support a more progressive and engaged PA.

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/bc667daf-2330-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/7ab80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdhYjgwNjc5LTJjMzAtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BNnfMqSh6bW9bh-rkdAYjexlpsJuCkdXVy2NRb7Fupw=&id=111098838 .

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Take action to elect Democrats in Virginia this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, We’re just over two weeks away from polls closing on Election Day in Virginia. But the election is already happening every day, thanks to Virginia’s great early and absentee voting options -- and it’s not too early to take action to make sure we elect Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and Democrats in the Virginia House of Delegates. **If you haven’t voted yet, visit[IWillVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659895/312082880/-1612268846?state=VA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI4MDY3OS0yYzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3v8h2r9HN0QfJ7MtZaMsYA55s17Bc-7_WsdmYF1MsE=&emci=751e82c0-2230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8fb80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1801409) right now to find out how and where to cast your ballot. ** Here are a few important dates to keep in mind as you make your plan to vote:
* **Friday, October 22:** Last day to apply for an absentee ballot online or via fax or mail. Once you receive your ballot, fill it out and return it right away. You can find ballot drop-off locations on [IWillVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659896/312082881/-409638297?state=VA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI4MDY3OS0yYzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3v8h2r9HN0QfJ7MtZaMsYA55s17Bc-7_WsdmYF1MsE=&emci=751e82c0-2230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8fb80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1801409). If you choose to mail your ballot back, it must be postmarked on or before Election Day.

* **Saturday, October 30: **Last day of in-person early voting at a [local voter registration office](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659897/312082882/99008776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI4MDY3OS0yYzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3v8h2r9HN0QfJ7MtZaMsYA55s17Bc-7_WsdmYF1MsE=&emci=751e82c0-2230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8fb80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1801409).

* **Tuesday, November 2: **Election Day (the last day to cast your ballot!). Polls will be open from 6 AM to 7 PM throughout Virginia.

If you’re all set on voting, I hope you’ll take the next step and help make sure all your neighbors, friends, and family are able to vote, too. [**Please sign up to volunteer at TerryMcAuliffe.com/Volunteer.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659898/312082883/-1603173659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI4MDY3OS0yYzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3v8h2r9HN0QfJ7MtZaMsYA55s17Bc-7_WsdmYF1MsE=&emci=751e82c0-2230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8fb80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1801409) Terry’s team will reach out to you with all the information and support you need to get out the vote in your neighborhood. | | [**SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37659899/312082884/-871093141?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODkyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmI4MDY3OS0yYzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3v8h2r9HN0QfJ7MtZaMsYA55s17Bc-7_WsdmYF1MsE=&emci=751e82c0-2230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=8fb80679-2c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1801409)
---
Polls are tight, and the eyes of the nation are looking at Virginia as we make a statement about where we’ll go as a Commonwealth and as a country. This is no time to be complacent or let our turnout numbers go down.
We’ve got to leave it all out on the field, so please join me in voting and volunteering for Democrats now!
Tim Kaine

clean_body: | | Derek, We’re just over two weeks away from polls closing on Election Day in Virginia. But the election is already happening every day, thanks to Virginia’s great early and absentee voting options -- and it’s not too early to take action to make sure we elect Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, Mark Herring, and Democrats in the Virginia House of Delegates. If you haven’t voted yet, visit right now to find out how and where to cast your ballot. Here are a few important dates to keep in mind as you make your plan to vote: Friday, October 22: Last day to apply for an absentee ballot online or via fax or mail. Once you receive your ballot, fill it out and return it right away. You can find ballot drop-off locations on . If you choose to mail your ballot back, it must be postmarked on or before Election Day. Saturday, October 30: Last day of in-person early voting at a . Tuesday, November 2: **Election Day (the last day to cast your ballot!). Polls will be open from 6 AM to 7 PM throughout Virginia. If you’re all set on voting, I hope you’ll take the next step and help make sure all your neighbors, friends, and family are able to vote, too. Terry’s team will reach out to you with all the information and support you need to get out the vote in your neighborhood. | | Polls are tight, and the eyes of the nation are looking at Virginia as we make a statement about where we’ll go as a Commonwealth and as a country. This is no time to be complacent or let our turnout numbers go down. We’ve got to leave it all out on the field, so please join me in voting and volunteering for Democrats now! Tim Kaine Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia P.O. name: Steve Scalise
subject: Peter, Trump’s border Wall GONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am furious. Joe Biden just ENDED all border contracts to build President Trump's Wall. But that's the end of it...
I am fuming and I think you will be too in about 30 seconds...
**Joe Biden just canceled all contracts to build President Trump 's Wall.**
But that's not the end of it \-- _Fox News just uncovered $100 million worth of Wall construction materials being held HOSTAGE by the Biden Administration._
Our border is at a breaking point... And Joe Biden is making this crisis SO MUCH WORSE.
[**I 'm pleading for the support of every last Pro-Wall American:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58559567:J53M3h2GN:m:1:3253819041:02B260ECF8714C31641DDF4FCCA5C7D4:r)
Conservatives are fighting the good fight to build The Wall and defend our great country... but we need urgent reinforcements to defeat these open-borders Democrats.
As of this morning, we do NOT have the resources we need to beat them. Here's the deal:
_WE WILL build The Wall ...
WE WILL defend our borders...
WE WILL save America..._
[**But that hinges on a few more Pro-Wall Americans willing to dig deep and hold the line.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58559567:J53M3h2GN:m:1:3253819041:02B260ECF8714C31641DDF4FCCA5C7D4:r)
**I know you 're not one to sit quietly by while Joe Biden destroys President Trump's crowning achievement.**
We need Trump's Wall. I intend on fighting for it. Do you?
Thank you,
Steve Scalise | House Republican Whip

body:
Patty Murray has chosen to put her head in the sand, I will not.

| Dear Friend,
---
| [The Seattle Times](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s0UoCgHzWXvVjX7dfx4M7HBuKSsnYq6zveL3Moj0t6cIezTYtgl435DIJAf1iyPZCUKnfvzJ2JfLLy3lauJg17YVwO9V3zaM7ib50QiL1WnYwmqrYPq_g9yZgntIYeyxMA--z4d4Wm6bQ-gmkKSy5wayMWNgBUGKRmYFGM-iDasGAEPPGR93FygOlUJ1ofccGdtYk0aU8WGqskXvFG7VFGLzqVNiFgMyyNfjYC1wqqlzYnhzYLO-JOfu2n6WczIv3QrFIUFB2GXRrLB-5oYLJeuHvZ9kfemIRLV4NL7Hydz-vO1uhu77Hnow6izCXJGb9zI7IeOmXz61yJa4xVItqsWFOpZylv_vZuMdf3oiNgnuePDWeYUx8isBhbAHkKp4tvLlaEDuWknRpfjKivDi652oMeTpWG7dgFSrNcGnEq6TGC-8W0LFnmWmsCyAuxD9l2FjQ-tNc9k=&c=Eq1Ssrjlr29JOVy2ASk5qXqc3ysFyerzLto15pyORlYCNEAOiz_W7Q==&ch=xwoBeqxXVHN69wPpvNVvYDOh_2_f_ws9UcFtriLjGG9VLhxTJvWmsg==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s0UoCgHzWXvVjX7dfx4M7HBuKSsnYq6zveL3Moj0t6cIezTYtgl435DIJAf1iyPZCUKnfvzJ2JfLLy3lauJg17YVwO9V3zaM7ib50QiL1WnYwmqrYPq_g9yZgntIYeyxMA--z4d4Wm6bQ-gmkKSy5wayMWNgBUGKRmYFGM-iDasGAEPPGR93FygOlUJ1ofccGdtYk0aU8WGqskXvFG7VFGLzqVNiFgMyyNfjYC1wqqlzYnhzYLO-JOfu2n6WczIv3QrFIUFB2GXRrLB-5oYLJeuHvZ9kfemIRLV4NL7Hydz-vO1uhu77Hnow6izCXJGb9zI7IeOmXz61yJa4xVItqsWFOpZylv_vZuMdf3oiNgnuePDWeYUx8isBhbAHkKp4tvLlaEDuWknRpfjKivDi652oMeTpWG7dgFSrNcGnEq6TGC-8W0LFnmWmsCyAuxD9l2FjQ-tNc9k=&c=Eq1Ssrjlr29JOVy2ASk5qXqc3ysFyerzLto15pyORlYCNEAOiz_W7Q==&ch=xwoBeqxXVHN69wPpvNVvYDOh_2_f_ws9UcFtriLjGG9VLhxTJvWmsg==)reported last week that gun violence in King County had already surpassed 2020's record total. As of September 30th, there were already 19 more shooting victims and 11 more shootings in Seattle than in all of 2020.
At the Harborview Medical Center, there was a 30% increase in patients being treated for gunshot wounds than at this point in 2020. At the same time, one of the leading candidates for Seattle City Attorney recently tweeted that local law enforcement, the same people putting their lives on the line to protect our community from this violence, should "eat some COVID laced sh*t."
The record gun violence in Seattle is heartbreaking, but completely unsurprising given the flood of police officers leaving the force and the lawless policies being advocated by King County officials. Officials spent 2020 demonizing our law enforcement and now candidates for office are even on the record as wanting to infect our police with COVID. This is wrong.
We can continue to put our heads in the sand and think abandoning those who are sworn to protect us will not have repercussions, or we can begin to support them as they do the tough job of securing our communities.
[Patty Murray has chosen to put her head in the sand, I will not.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s0UoCgHzWXvVjX7dfx4M7HBuKSsnYq6zveL3Moj0t6cIezTYtgl435DIJAf1iyPZpLOEiIBsDu3p3TYxd6SmLNp6j296r9Db_18oBZ1zmD8lUxmSCB-lhzB3OYZVpaFWVVGg5IatQswLLU1GEsBOuqHGvPC3_rgl5B1pmhI7-R44pA-FUj92xRa-e1dKJoRUfe8rvmC3nxxO0sQuaA0y1GdduZYMjiTbV2aMGQxVInUr_KWs5A465AAd2lSCGXHe-vejv6iY_38=&c=Eq1Ssrjlr29JOVy2ASk5qXqc3ysFyerzLto15pyORlYCNEAOiz_W7Q==&ch=xwoBeqxXVHN69wPpvNVvYDOh_2_f_ws9UcFtriLjGG9VLhxTJvWmsg==)

| Do you stand with me?
Let's show Patty Murray, and all of Washington's politicians who are demonizing our heroes that Washington will not allow them to win. Let's show them that we will support our law enforcement and we will fight to keep Washington State the safe and wonderful state we so dearly love. Let's win in November of 2022!
Together we win,
Tiffany

clean_body: Patty Murray has chosen to put her head in the sand, I will not. | | | | | | | == | | | Dear Friend, | last week that gun violence in King County had already surpassed 2020's record total. As of September 30th, there were already 19 more shooting victims and 11 more shootings in Seattle than in all of 2020. At the Harborview Medical Center, there was a 30% increase in patients being treated for gunshot wounds than at this point in 2020. At the same time, one of the leading candidates for Seattle City Attorney recently tweeted that local law enforcement, the same people putting their lives on the line to protect our community from this violence, should "eat some COVID laced sh*t." The record gun violence in Seattle is heartbreaking, but completely unsurprising given the flood of police officers leaving the force and the lawless policies being advocated by King County officials. Officials spent 2020 demonizing our law enforcement and now candidates for office are even on the record as wanting to infect our police with COVID. This is wrong. We can continue to put our heads in the sand and think abandoning those who are sworn to protect us will not have repercussions, or we can begin to support them as they do the tough job of securing our communities. == | == | Do you stand with me? Let's show Patty Murray, and all of Washington's politicians who are demonizing our heroes that Washington will not allow them to win. Let's show them that we will support our law enforcement and we will fight to keep Washington State the safe and wonderful state we so dearly love. Let's win in November of 2022! Together we win, Tiffany | PS: If you want to help us win in November of 2022 we need your help to raise the funds necessary to retire Patty Murray and fight the dangerous policies being pushed by elected officials in King County and throughout Washington. == | | | == | | | Smiley for Washington, Inc. | P.O. BOX 1058, Richland, WA 99352 | | Sent by mailto:tiffany@smileyforwashington.com powered by

name: Jake Evans
subject: Reminder: Election Integrity Is Everything.
body:
It should be easy to vote and impossible to cheat...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friends,
It should be easy to vote, and nearly impossible to cheat in our elections.
And when fraud is exposed, it should be proven in the court of law, and it must never be certified.
When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but it's been going on for decades in this country, and very few people have had the courage to stand up against it.
I don't just talk about election integrity, as an election lawyer, I have legally proven fraud and fought all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States to DEFEND the integrity of our elections.
Nearly three years ago I was the [first election lawyer in the state](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g8YV09mmtuHipjUD8n8QnQyCVStzL2rpaqQslXIK-0Xen7LxNYNkcsMFsihoY5ecVwIqEf8s6ppzINQa0fGP_Tw7eRBxMJyc6HIF7SNXCNRpOix9kwHPn4OMbAZb77-0-0Zkfe5HrYcMpo0ic77YKRekNugL7UPVM18O6T_ZfMaeGOB7ipZzNJpFPiJZdPI89NqOxfqHRy2GkGnZphkvAw==&c=BlX7dF6CjsPMm-PqQ4OMhjtXBc68BwavwY0h258KeF5pR4WKjgrZPg==&ch=QOwQWdRGtia6YMMworX_EWJIuTHnnzqZMudqFKmmlFeT2kiG21pR-A==) of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice.
I don't just talk about election integrity, I fight for it every single day. Without secure elections and confidence that every legal vote is counted, we don't have a constitutional Republic.
Help me defeat radical leftist Lucy McBath in 2022 and I will fight for safe and secure elections in the halls of Congress every single day.
[A donation of $5, $10, $15, $25, or more will help us fund our war chest to retire Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and STOP the Democrats from passing far-left bills designed to weaken our elections like HR1.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g8YV09mmtuHipjUD8n8QnQyCVStzL2rpaqQslXIK-0Xen7LxNYNkchQ7WPT7CegmtRX-m_soMI--y-R-m2Nh-YMzoPWw75byBKtud8Km4bLUStnTXafarnbGJx3eM88vMw4iH0Cg14f3WEmwk8S4rcF5jp4GICYhseuhz3pqHgSGIECQ0w8RFU0jYRK8NXZ9&c=BlX7dF6CjsPMm-PqQ4OMhjtXBc68BwavwY0h258KeF5pR4WKjgrZPg==&ch=QOwQWdRGtia6YMMworX_EWJIuTHnnzqZMudqFKmmlFeT2kiG21pR-A==)
Support my America First Campaign TODAY and we will stop the radical left's federal takeover of our elections.

Securing our elections and weeding out the fraud is one of the most important battles of our time and there is no one more equipped to take on the challenge than me.

clean_body: It should be easy to vote and impossible to cheat... | | | | | | | | Dear Friends, It should be easy to vote, and nearly impossible to cheat in our elections. And when fraud is exposed, it should be proven in the court of law, and it must never be certified. When we talk about election fraud, most people think about the 2020 Election, but it's been going on for decades in this country, and very few people have had the courage to stand up against it. I don't just talk about election integrity, as an election lawyer, I have legally proven fraud and fought all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States to DEFEND the integrity of our elections. Nearly three years ago I was the == of Georgia to not just overturn an election in the courts once, but twice. I don't just talk about election integrity, I fight for it every single day. Without secure elections and confidence that every legal vote is counted, we don't have a constitutional Republic. Help me defeat radical leftist Lucy McBath in 2022 and I will fight for safe and secure elections in the halls of Congress every single day. == Support my America First Campaign TODAY and we will stop the radical left's federal takeover of our elections. | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == Securing our elections and weeding out the fraud is one of the most important battles of our time and there is no one more equipped to take on the challenge than me. == Sincerely, Jake Evans GOP Candidate for GA-6 | | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. Box 1483, Roswell, GA 30077 | | Sent by mailto:news@jakeevans.org powered by

I have worked as a prosecutor, defense attorney, civil attorney, and a state legislator in Arizona. I know this state's criminal justice system inside and out. I know how to get things done — and I'm painfully familiar with what _must_ change.

**I'm going to put an end to for-profit prisons. [You can join me by chipping in now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37661210/312089488/2127152568?refcode=X_101821_EndingPrivatePrisons&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNlNWFhOC0zMDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbS8qgnl_sb4AaiU78PLsfAz_vkXEnIyUtSI8uLQeNc=)**

**For years, for-profit prison lobbyists have fed money into the pockets of Arizona politicians.** In return, those politicians have made sure that Arizona's prisons have remained operating at full capacity. I fought this in the legislature — but couldn't even get bills to allow for early release in certain cases onto the floor.

_Putting a campaign donation over someone's freedom is a reprehensible abuse of power._

As Attorney General, I'll work **relentlessly** to end private prisons in Arizona. We cannot trades lives for profit. **And I'm calling on all my opponents in this race to commit to doing the same.**

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Stand Up For America...Don't Comply
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=ByFkfu&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyfXMwg&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/47384dc1-44ec-4205-8adc-d3e1290a66fc.png]

As vaccine mandates roll out more people are saying no.

The "No. You move" rally I attended in Olympia, WA was filled with Americans united together against an unconstitutional mandate taking away our freedom of choice.

There was well over 3,000 people of various backgrounds standing shoulder to shoulder and saying, "Hell no!" to government overreach. You can listen to what I had to say at the rally here. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKcfr&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFhWJ7r&]

At the rally in Olympia we heard from teachers, health workers, Washington State Patrol, and many others who are refusing to back down and be bullied into submission. I salute them for standing firm and not complying. "We the people" must insure our rights are not infringed upon.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/d2b363b6-ce7d-4fb6-bab8-85ad6cf4dc49.jpg]

If our government can tell us to inject something into our bodies and not allow us to make our own health choices, what else will they try to force us to do? There will be no end to the left's tyranny.

This isn't a fight against those who have received and believe in the benefit of the COVID shots. This is a fight for our unalienable rights guaranteed to us by our federal and state constitutions. As I've said publicly many times before, if you want to get the shot or have gotten the shot--that's fine. It is wholly your decision. If you have not gotten the shot or do not intend to get the shot--that's fine. It is wholly your decision. My issue isn't with the shot, my issue is with the mandate and the threats.

Across our country, there is also a movement of patriots refusing to comply.

An airline pilot spoke out against the forced vaccination mandate being pushed by private companies saying, "If we give into these mandates and we do not stand up for our freedom of choice, we dishonor every armed service person over the last 257 years. A disservice to the people who have fought and bled for the very freedoms we enjoy."

Under the Biden administration, they believe they have the right to control every aspect of our lives. Our businesses, our land, our children, and now our bodies.

I will not comply...I'd encourage all of you to do the same.

The American Spirit is alive and strong but we must work together and encourage our fellow Americans to hold the line. When I'm your Congressman, I will fight to bring the power back to the states and to the local communities. Together we can save America for our generation and for our children and grandchildren.

Honored to serve.

Don't Tread on Me. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKc8n&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECB8Qk&]

Loren

PS: We still need to your support to keep up with our opponents who are dumping huge amounts of special interest money and their own personal money (because he doesn't have very many supporters) into this race.

I have news for them: We the People's vote isn't for sale.

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKcUH&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMbCht1&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKckQ&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIiVGP0&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKcYp&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Ehfbzfm&]

I WANT TO GO ALL IN FOR $2,900 TO GET RID OF NEWHOUSE [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SeKcxW&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Eti7VTL&]

PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS

, 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States

You may unsubscribe [https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=ByFkfu&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwIOh6v&pt=unsubscribe] or change your contact details [https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=ByFkfu&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ES4ew5e&pt=change_details] at any time.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsdv7murvghip0101f2jn7aa41g2qiech1s4p31g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljmaoj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongm1pn0pr4coomdd3mm4oj3cjielp78sphcer33dhnc6oj4dj5e5p7echjmpi31puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3666pbbd1nmaomccbgm9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcv91ie5khpbto738rmk0lm77qougtmqbt1kd5pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljmaoj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0bt0b59n3fcv5a752vpm20enhqk1rq1nb3s3660_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljmaoj4cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4tcqfkio8lc5vrojlfm4e3hpnqpr2hj6u8ak6ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljmaoj4cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | Y’all — We are only **15 days** from November’s election — and we need your help. The Virginia Democrats team has been working tirelessly to protect and expand our majority in the House of Delegates and hold onto our statewide offices, but we can’t win this election alone. Derek, we’ll be honest with you — **keeping our majority in the House is going to come down to only a few thousand votes.** In 2017, Shelley Simonds’ race ended in a _tie_. In 2019, _seven_ House of Delegates races were decided by less than a thousand votes. **HD 27:** 189 votes
**HD 75:** 506 votes
**HD 81:** 970 votes
**HD 83:** 27 votes
**HD 84:** 500 votes
**HD 85:** 802 votes
**HD 100:** 881 votes **A total of seven races. All decided collectively by only 3,875 Virginians.** Listen, Derek — we only have a five seat majority in the House and with races as historically close as the HD-83 race that came down to just 27 votes, we know we can’t leave anything to chance. **[Can we count on you to chip in $25 right now to help power the last-minute effort to protect our House majority before November’s election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37662099/312094529/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211018-15days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2FhOTlkYy0zNDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xF_cS-re4ekhRztU97UJ96RauNmxqtxi9rgktEz0mY=)** **We’re reaching out to you, Derek, because you’re one of our strongest supporters. On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our Democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

The January 6 Commission was founded to understand why the insurrection happened, to learn what exactly transpired that day, to stop one from ever happening again, and to bring to justice the extremists who brought about that deadly day.

Now, instead of complying with the Commission’s subpoena, Trump’s right-hand man extremist Steve Bannon went to a campaign event for Glenn Youngkin, Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia.

**[We can’t let Bannon get away with this. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz. name: ICYMI News
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfhci7sggudgj4altjthav1u5dmt8terotqq8vu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf5v8ttk9uckr2ul2pqnb30acua40iigoge2efdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcl932bi24fo3als7thisskoh4ovrlod6ot5ceag_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdcft7mldbnps32gpi8ljlofrnafop3hvbkts2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh2bs)**
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2am5etidqhcto8c8khocnpl4084g1k29dktuj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zofuepdeapkkhmgviv8nssdj49bm27tfcrdf7jkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm6pb2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onmmdj73dr1mpg66djle1gj1orgeuobasr3edjrepjgspjrasj3moq76t74m6on1oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztgk9k79k3m4uafj4lc7ckenud1eihi6qu5i36bg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5imeor5c9hm49fg)

name: Blue Ohio 2022 (via John Cranley for Governor)
subject: 3 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
