name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znkkeeie9jpi6ge0vp4lv1c226jdi40gnm0p295o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj5j53liolj929h7jnbjhnn6sgo52cv1tauuedv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl43o2i5l60lftmtt0si1ptcfdd400kaudm6qmgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zputsabd6qa7inba4lvlaphkqmkk5m8anbt8pop8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeaet3egius742ns9h5o4urtl3nrp6jt5e6vaohg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zal0h4a2tkeas5t8ohfe04taavgmh8pe0ftc2u18_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvm0qjb14lvobr0tmbfdb2uslq5vgsb2ln5ktto8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0j6ofk9pdjlpae88jjmh3suprbpb0me2ghhb4p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8fgrseivv4ld4f74qg4q1fpe0cqvpdbptea7140_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd1mcl6to58cland1nnnqdqciqo1be2db8s8rsk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zidt30np4uqgk1eipmu1t4ako38ol67f8ro1h3mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cljm1oj3chh2bs) **
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zoe1rm81og0sjhdvjp8qqnj1lo3p6pmef5bplm5g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3klb2oue1nfv3s7hmvviuan2gc7r4tfdid8m9jg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5imeo72cdi649fg)

body:
This is a BIG DEAL! But to gain entrance to the elite Young Guns program, our campaign needs to prove we have the support needed to WIN. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6473a705596f43dfaa18c4cd752bb077&_e=Gj8vKP0NorWKGOBF7BkTBEJ2c7RQiitm2pQboSQJSMF-2Xtk5IMOhl1ceWDApRx2IfEnj7NC5hdm_j1okpC45EDqg6YqsAT-CgndCosKsla3mzF--2F7NFvcTZOk0PKRMLvwmC-nLfnNJRLmHrqyg7g3fHl3P9uh8usdGVBdyi0li3bAMgKJY9Duy01XN2wBR4srkNkfL5wr2Q_hQFBd1XrGkI320NXRt-yJcdi2sJ1rWPdLCuFFjEtyEa_nvk1VAc8l7o33hz_A7bB9Dss9Or441OZcpsLSpM34RleRkbs2P8Ea94Q0eg9jFQD-nHWNEjysWPTE--3zN-qcz2xhCa6-VBReSjQXDDOtk7YGlEMty0CqnIuH_VXW37Vcqm3Cop9aKGp6FHbhxhc5lSMbbh_718GB1Me-Jn0FWQ9vpRBEjcjTQ-7kvf127BfgWrh041_qFoUHZpXgOvBdvTKT8w%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I have some exciting news to share with you: **Leader Kevin McCarthy is considering adding me to the National Republican Congressional Committees'_"Young Guns"_ watch list!**

**This is a BIG DEAL!** But to gain entrance to this elite program, our campaign needs to prove we have the support needed to WIN.

**That’s why I am setting a fundraising goal of $50,000 - all contributed by grassroots conservatives like yourself before the end of the month.**

name: MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: Where do you stand on Doug LaMalfa, friend? (Be honest)

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Senator Zucker is on Team Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
I’m honored to have received the endorsement of one of Montgomery County’s most dynamic leaders, Senator Craig Zucker, and I’m delighted to share with you our newly-released video!
As Senator for District 14 in Montgomery County, Craig has played a leading role in making sure that Maryland’s higher education institutions continue to offer affordable tuition, and has been a tireless champion for Marylanders with developmental disabilities -- including sponsoring legislation that gave thousands of students with developmental disabilities the opportunity to go to college. I am truly humbled to be standing with Craig in the fight to secure a better and stronger future for our state in 2022.
You can learn more about why he’s endorsing me by checking out our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=20.22]As your Comptroller, I’ve built an unparalleled coalition of support between elected officials and community leaders in every county and jurisdiction within our state. If I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll partner with them to ensure that we leave no family behind.
From building world-class transit that connects all corners of the state, to expanding affordable and quality healthcare, to guaranteeing a healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay, to achieving statewide 5G and more, I have a plan to make Maryland the leading state in our nation, known by all as a bastion of economic fairness and social equality.
This bold vision for our future can only be made possible by your continuing support of this movement. This election could very well be the most expensive in our state’s history, which is why I need to rely on grassroots supporters to help us meet our fundraising goals and make sure that we don’t fall behind. That’s why I am humbly asking for your support today. If you are able, will you chip in to help us maintain our momentum and win this race?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement]I can’t thank you enough for your continued support. Our people-powered movement is growing stronger by the day, and it’s all thanks to grassroots supporters like you. Together, we’re going to deliver on the concrete points of progress that will lift all of Maryland’s working families into the quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/craigzuckerendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6ece93a1-5a25-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/687f3a3b-3d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODdmM2EzYi0zZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hVjdJ-TAYa5sJ_ikNfJwetp2RtRCby3YIvrS5Gycxeg=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

subject: If we lose, McConnell will be the Senate Majority Leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team, **According to a recent UNH poll, Maggie is down by ONE point to McConnell's handpicked candidate.** With control of the Senate hinging on New Hampshire, the last thing Granite Staters need is a rubber stamp for McConnell's extreme agenda. If Mitch McConnell takes back the gavel, he will block critical legislation on voting rights protections, climate change, reproductive rights, and more. He even promised that if Republicans take back the Senate majority, he’ll refuse to consider any of President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. With Donald Trump’s three ultra-conservative justices already skewing the balance of the Court, that’s not a chance we can afford to take. **[It’s why we have to ask you, friend: Can you rush $5 or as much as you can to protect this vulnerable Senate seat and Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37664582/312105780/-214106137?refcode=e20211018_mcconnell-poll-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJjNWE5ZC0zZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-bZQ0u5iWEpkXfBI8wFtgxJVSGCIQ_Lf4Y1a8I1Vjk=)** | | [Chip in today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37664583/312105783/-214106137?refcode=e20211018_mcconnell-poll-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJjNWE5ZC0zZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-bZQ0u5iWEpkXfBI8wFtgxJVSGCIQ_Lf4Y1a8I1Vjk=)

Fellow American -

Democrats want kids to hate this country, hate freedom, and hate themselves...

It’s why they are pushing so hard to have _Critical Race Theory_ taught in schools. But the Biden Administration has taken it a step too far - targeting parents of public-school children for speaking out at school board meetings and posting on social media.

That’s right, Fellow American, the Department of Justice is unconstitutionally attempting to silence parents that are speaking out against the divisive cultural Marxist push to indoctrinate our kids with identity politics lies about Americans and our society.

Let’s be very clear here: **parents who object at school board meetings to their kids being taught _Critical Race Theory_ are not terrorists.**

This absurd attempt by Democrats to silence free speech and further their socialist agenda is a complete over-reach of power. The government has no business telling me -or any other parent for that matter- how to raise their kids.

Fellow American, it’s bad enough that the Left is so determined to promote a dishonest worldview that blames one group of Americans for all the troubles others face.

It’s even worse when the rule of law and the sovereignty of the states is undermined by a radical left-wing Administration determined to indoctrinate our children with dangerous and vindictive attacks on our history, our people, and our culture.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OUTRAISED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |
---

* Mandate vaccines for kids K-12 in California

| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=eed86a98005a41dcaa0607d32478d08e&_e=p81eprEL00jkBdH_U6YHuBd0qj9ZcB7rB4lv8UyKZh0BFAA6Rkbg0hWt-xP6g32JY8f07dzFZSw6mB1b6mGZHm_BKh2U-Niv6SesjgiO07C-WmqKRk79OxBbfOVfoILhsqLZGIbFCh0VE_1CK5Vx0y8CDyPSnGG_97pYM-fV2DesoqKHjjpawhrqv5bEWp5bSzdRE4TWd4JiX-HA0pQXV6-09qfGEY1Nn-m2-xNnNOT1r3INLeO7Hdhi6MDayA3xXBJz-TzKnQStnHiDQ4755XUJDYMax5xn2wOOul6EhB0281ePebPAqgvpJ2OU13t7bjrTpLIZ3wdZP0hkSE1JWvsMLgjC067S_tFX5BJnLSPJ5KcQarXiEtZ6bco1CHCEGu_bigrGWnWDfBBvEmwrBvatvb43G8-fi7kElcpZpr0avPPEY3uwi0a1klmhTz8bwjXPE_Om0C1YSnXQfltP1Q%3D%3D) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *
---
Friends,

**_Are you tired of life under the Biden Administration and unified Democrat control in Washington?_** The 2022 North Carolina race for U.S. Senate is one of our chances to stop the disarray caused by the Woke Mob and the Socialist Left.

_If we don't elect a strong conservative to the Senate, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will continue to rip up our Constitution and plunge our communities into chaos._
| [**STOP THE DEMOCRAT DISARRAY**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=eed86a98005a41dcaa0607d32478d08e&_e=p81eprEL00jkBdH_U6YHuBd0qj9ZcB7rB4lv8UyKZh0BFAA6Rkbg0hWt-xP6g32JY8f07dzFZSw6mB1b6mGZHm_BKh2U-Niv6SesjgiO07C-WmqKRk79OxBbfOVfoILhsqLZGIbFCh0VE_1CK5Vx0y8CDyPSnGG_97pYM-fV2DesoqKHjjpawhrqv5bEWp5bSzdRE4TWd4JiX-HA0pQXV6-09qfGEY1Nn-m2-xNnNOT1r3INLeO7Hdhi6MDayA3xXX8wpuMWStvGKGaVCRMSTXHNTYG64Ttn4t0THTqi6SIEJyCBwAI_TERLS_f4GIX4HLZXXrXmxKKwCD6hbY8P3z92AIlbopBeNkk8oo2Y5O8FGayyWBp-DCY1BA73xvEA8GNZSX7nQ5quL8km6PjPiC7RAhLsQHjVnHiN90XB8nsCrS9M5w9Am2LvNHDJVavRkhZDMVvy0rRg7rAHPYhQBw%3D%3D)
---

**_If you are tired of insane levels of inflation, the crisis at the Southern Border, rising crime levels, and Democrat leaders abandoning Americans in foreign countries then you are not alone._** I will bring common sense to Washington DC and the US Senate. I'm no Washington insider and I don't give a rip about the partisan games that crooked politicians play in D.C.

clean_body: Our chance to strike back against Joe Biden! | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Friends, Are you tired of life under the Biden Administration and unified Democrat control in Washington? The 2022 North Carolina race for U.S. Senate is one of our chances to stop the disarray caused by the Woke Mob and the Socialist Left. If we don't elect a strong conservative to the Senate, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will continue to rip up our Constitution and plunge our communities into chaos. | If you are tired of insane levels of inflation, the crisis at the Southern Border, rising crime levels, and Democrat leaders abandoning Americans in foreign countries then you are not alone. I will bring common sense to Washington DC and the US Senate. I'm no Washington insider and I don't give a rip about the partisan games that crooked politicians play in D.C. With your support, we will strike back against the Radical Left, regain control of the Senate and get our great country back on track. We can't do it alone. Let's keep North Carolina RED! Sincerely, Ted Budd TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Fellow Conservative,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8d8a14295d14d92a5e5c692156617b6&_e=45v1RyBJ6I8OJtAjAPwA83bXgks5v-dX2YA3sYwrKHxhi9qsJtMEs9J1Jj6zfOk7BDb2MpgXIcWh9YYT76Ne-3YmUmtgDhOnHA_pYBDv2U36mkeEI6oy-ucI2lbK2hQxqyxozZ11J8NY4jaToIAxc4Cz0xf2yQXzh4LIp4i8BgZDCbq85Qmj3LD8rghGOwbY0ani_TO8PdXlrBDNb7RGxI51ZE07LWdDw49sVUzc4CcaVLAw5dZMI-ze0hp1ORos2-rlZnRuNoej62ewIuQ_FCHP9Xd9AKmh6F9BbBsaNMyVhT4DA4q56jKVNy3zg7jBMJPD3x6LNajlcbZkSWa8prEVhm8mmvkKzKpZiXTQPe95PulmKevIqCxsTfyHwrKLngurSTqXisjDkImBXG___l8-rudicKs6aYVswmyE_Xyd82oXem8s5kdm4HmD4glarnj6gcDWhGr-BBW9VApSdQ%3D%3D)

[**Will you join me by chipping in $10 or more right now to Billy Long for Senate?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8d8a14295d14d92a5e5c692156617b6&_e=45v1RyBJ6I8OJtAjAPwA83bXgks5v-dX2YA3sYwrKHxhi9qsJtMEs9J1Jj6zfOk7BDb2MpgXIcWh9YYT76Ne-3YmUmtgDhOnHA_pYBDv2U36mkeEI6oy-ucI2lbK2hQxqyxozZ11J8NY4jaToIAxc4Cz0xf2yQXzh4LIp4i8BgZDCbq85Qmj3LD8rghGOwbY0ani_TO8PdXlrBDNb7RGxI51ZE07LWdDw49sVUzc4CcaVLAw5dZMI-ze0hp1ORos82KxMJBR54z-muD7Ukiz-lTEm8nKbR3qSP8PS3GzFPjBHlVB3Ve7rejtXqo5TBPCnhmwGmNIBsR8qUYyFV3YsW5Ja2v1FAC1828xOZid9QRPBkgs3M0dosrTQTHq06USmFTQMZIcOolIbH5r7tBHqnh2fw8YOUGabAsD-2I-XAQvsnuCiJeHzrx6-BVN6kwDnR9B5GrkPw8aMYLE565XJw%3D%3D)

From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8d8a14295d14d92a5e5c692156617b6&_e=45v1RyBJ6I8OJtAjAPwA83bXgks5v-dX2YA3sYwrKHxhi9qsJtMEs9J1Jj6zfOk7BDb2MpgXIcWh9YYT76Ne-3YmUmtgDhOnHA_pYBDv2U36mkeEI6oy-ucI2lbK2hQxqyxozZ11J8NY4jaToIAxc4Cz0xf2yQXzh4LIp4i8BgZDCbq85Qmj3LD8rghGOwbY0ani_TO8PdXlrBDNb7RGxI51ZE07LWdDw49sVUzc4CcaVLAw5dZMI-ze0hp1ORoshxlGQgYPoc8TBr__4ExM4dgC_u_OG-CQyimBl7Z7mSZUOvTiQ2CHLUKgtUCH-YKeYs_b3216zpRqFYKpRkR8aNIU9b2z3XiTRMYF4zHXcxeLlFhiDGAPzR44dwTO5SWQFS3nv5rlo8Y2j4k3XELBf9WWatHS-PquEsw0fy_KeHQ7QcisiaTPkwCWvGS-dOkBMKtqUyl7EJaYFfkh4ueRiQ%3D%3D)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8d8a14295d14d92a5e5c692156617b6&_e=45v1RyBJ6I8OJtAjAPwA83bXgks5v-dX2YA3sYwrKHxhi9qsJtMEs9J1Jj6zfOk7BDb2MpgXIcWh9YYT76Ne-3YmUmtgDhOnHA_pYBDv2U36mkeEI6oy-ucI2lbK2hQxqyxozZ11J8NY4jaToIAxc4Cz0xf2yQXzh4LIp4i8BgZDCbq85Qmj3LD8rghGOwbY0ani_TO8PdXlrBDNb7RGxI51ZE07LWdDw49sVUzc4CcaVLAw5dZMI-ze0hp1ORosE2HWeQV7E1K9vxGInuMRDMdFHWLlK3JAnhvkFSkmEvFUIlbpj8V5ESnPNRoqW0G6wrJZhiwm3x8icQGv6GqEs1tBoBG6xseOvoAL_p01DDppW2TybpM0Up0LZE3MdOBE_omZO3tjZo8sW6YJPxqglCX168WkkRlMXl6sPzMqUuJz4WsJBhnoYnnvZYJ9iD425C_MLJ3x7MWrWwFtM-tigA%3D%3D)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Fellow Conservative, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f8d8a14295d14d92a5e5c692156617b6&_e=45v1RyBJ6I8OJtAjAPwA83bXgks5v-dX2YA3sYwrKHxhi9qsJtMEs9J1Jj6zfOk7BDb2MpgXIcWh9YYT76Ne-3YmUmtgDhOnHA_pYBDv2U36mkeEI6oy-ucI2lbK2hQxqyxozZ11J8NY4jaToIAxc4Cz0xf2yQXzh4LIp4i8BgZDCbq85Qmj3LD8rghGOwbY0ani_TO8PdXlrBDNb7RGxI51ZE07LWdDw49sVUzc4CcaVLAw5dZMI-ze0hp1ORosl5vP_ENe4RGWHEYu6xbqoBtqlFHxewCLc31xd0hp53BQmqlryTS5DJ8NtmeQRPiHHVanHvmLj1P3WRJ_rqPx9IuddXrA8tTsvKJOx6Jh3rAgBqHRgs8QBNkQ_Wn_RAy_hxEdMkMB5bvgddunRnvHVF0mYu03a0aPU3SOFhX0fAPxuxMcRqnM8arvTALDV9FWT9aijwuc31WRh7WUutezeQ%3D%3D)

subject: Facebook is targeting us
body:
Facebook is suppressing our content.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmc21k1b1jr3car3a65rk457o8ipcndbdv37o78g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh63gm7dhncmqrdctmelim4plk6pondc30slqmbcrheqpj6s73c1i62cj4spq60puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3666rjadhnm9o6cclgm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr0k832k32boq62bdo9ar7r2q3pd61i34rmqpjh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh2bs) | |

Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjjs2jl3kejpd83gtbcb029k2lfbet5v1bq20s1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh2bs)
Despite our growing audience—we have many more followers now than we did a year ago—we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach — they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkkughva7k3ebsnb97l6kjrqkjrg9oo39uil9rro_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh2bs)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvbpja9u0jsbfj6p2dkb2lk0k4khflceh8bkunf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh2bs)
[**Subscribe**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2qgld72vt5uk3j37ccm2p49caj4rjeo5akcnj10_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clgecor0cjh2bs)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|
---

The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ab843439ebc04322a8c746d45a1fa03f&_e=ws2JNScA0WFGScBoZcC2uqlnSIqWlWkhZ0_hHyu67znjqrwX-Kivn8aCCCO7bEVoUTHxpGNzvrapbnacOk_HDIrMBOSM8XhEXyghNiFJo_cgBPSNgSahWe-8aQfg3s_BCkapoHub3aD3tGvtnIBcguXYpx47c5cZQTo7B_gLFVafPHM6gHXEc2Sg1j-7cwNCzcdLPwW14zjO_Pu-k6joUimBLRCP8ZdBWAH-GDeemmQeYU6_jeEcJQOB1DCs509uXYpX0367YCplx2XUfLJL9AVgjQSVWC12ybvXBOS7kaQb8ixK4lk9yULQuxUXRBjR9TSihVsvJGJDfyaFr2YkbPwv_bawIRhgwelf9BEZzrpSxkNPTDNiwczlE8VOOVEuI6g0iDj9DZXgSh9HITXDs4KBSspPiQviXBdwwhSzlBntpuFnfGCt9XLcPVgtm99UtQq40OXl-Ro5kx34ehnOgMP_DiCzSZheav4kZ0ZTfVN5_oZXNr9BxYPuhdfpQDqIYc5KSHfHOd89ekNa3NZnS9NS9fA6QWrpz6oQKMHwqKk%3D)

Peter,

I’ve told you about my own major policy priorities if I’m elected the next Member of Congress representing Arizona’s 9th District - in short, I plan to replace the disastrous Democrats’ Debt, Division, and Dependency with smart policies that focus on Economics, Education, and true Equality for all Arizonans and all Americans.

[**But to run the most effective campaign, to truly understand the issues that are most concerning to voters here, I’m counting on the indispensable feedback of grassroots conservatives like you, Peter!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ab843439ebc04322a8c746d45a1fa03f&_e=ws2JNScA0WFGScBoZcC2uqlnSIqWlWkhZ0_hHyu67znjqrwX-Kivn8aCCCO7bEVoUTHxpGNzvrapbnacOk_HDIrMBOSM8XhEXyghNiFJo_cgBPSNgSahWe-8aQfg3s_BCkapoHub3aD3tGvtnIBcguXYpx47c5cZQTo7B_gLFVafPHM6gHXEc2Sg1j-7cwNCzcdLPwW14zjO_Pu-k6joUimBLRCP8ZdBWAH-GDeemmQeYU6_jeEcJQOB1DCs509uXYpX0367YCplx2XUfLJL9AVgjQSVWC12ybvXBOS7kaQb8ixK4lk9yULQuxUXRBjR9TSihVsvJGJDfyaFr2YkbDlaP4-5596Cy3u_UojfqYs_NocXPmAKVI_crplVCrYuIwxXI2XifGm7atLdbmigNUWnXsyZpNE5cBCjjLN2SjUag6YCRQA9d43qJSFVdbaSaj5mDjwb_hg_MjU5sdF9yIzUvfeMhb_Ob7xip8epbUHBSLUYu1XiY6E-DyO3rInHPQlBtJKWTHuc2jQwB_JiQsi9Ji-YnyqVaj1oXsQqJFU%3D)

Peter, in my opinion, the Democrats have been doing a predictably terrible job in the majority, spending like there’s no tomorrow and dividing us with radical identity politics.

| Hi ,

**Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have.** The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.

| [SEND LETTERS TO GET OUT THE VOTE](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=914d5e65ee&e=400a181d5a "SEND LETTERS TO GET OUT THE VOTE")

| **_We've made it super easy to send letters_** to your neighbors about the importance of the upcoming election:
1. Open the [template letter](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3ecd78a905&e=400a181d5a), make a copy and personalize it (if you want!)
2. Click “[Take Action” on the Mobilize Sign Up](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=03547e6742&e=400a181d5a) and you'll be taken to a template letter that you can download and personalize. Once you've sent your edits back to us, the campaign will pull a list of targeted voters in your area and email you all the letters ready to print!
3. All you'll have to do it hit "print," sign the letters with a little note, and then address and mail them!

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of October 18th: Voter fraud bill, school boards & more!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* National: STOP the Democrats takeover of elections – vote likely on Wednesday
* Local: Get your school board out of the NSBA
* Recommended reading
* Reminders about school board webinars and defending doctors

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**National: STOP the Democrats takeover of elections!**
The time has arrived! The Senate will likely vote on Wednesday on the supposed “compromise” bill to take over our elections. It’s a frightening bill that will allow Democrats to control every state’s elections and cement their power illegitimately. For a more detailed rundown of just some of the terrible parts of the bill, [please see this list.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0xMC0xOD9taWQ9NDQ0NjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRI2YyY2E&K=xi_ikrs762bzN5oU1Y1kyQ)
**We need to call our Senators and tell them to vote no, as well as tell them to hold the line on the filibuster.** If this vote fails, there will be an unreal amount of left-wing pressure on Sen. Manchin and Sen. Sinema to get rid of the filibuster, so that Democrats can pass literally anything they want to pass.

**For both of your US Senators, please do the following:**
* Call the DC office [(Find your Senators’ numbers here.)](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZmluZC1zZW5hdG9ycz9taWQ9NDQ0NjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Hpp_Yg2dZy7GXhE4CvD2wg)
* Call one local/state office – to find one of the local office numbers, go to the home page of your Senator’s official government website and they’re usually listed under “offices” or “office locations,” though sometimes you have to go to the “contact” page first. Just poke around and you’ll find it. Or, when you call the DC office, you could also ask for the number of a local office.
* **Message:** Vote NO on the “Freedom to Vote Act,” because it is really a “Freedom to Cheat Act.” It removes nearly all safeguards to ensure our elections have integrity, and it gives power over every state’s elections to the federal government, which makes it easier to cheat. Additionally, keep the filibuster as is – DO NOT make any changes to the filibuster. Thank you.

|
---
[Private backroom debates about what Democrats should include in their massive spending bill are becoming public.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tL2Nvcm5lci9zYW5kZXJzLWlzc3Vlcy11bHRpbWF0dW0tb24tbWVkaWNhcmUtZXhwYW5zaW9uLXdoaWNoLW1hbmNoaW4tc2F5cy1oZS1vcHBvc2VzLyUyMD9taWQ9NDQ0NjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=B6JOskD8AJm7nObtMhoYPQ) Bernie Sanders has been calling out less enthusiastic Senators for holding up the bill and recently issued an ultimatum about how his priorities must be included – or else. Sanders [bizarrely seems to believe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25uLmNvbS8yMDIxLzEwLzA3L3BvbGl0aWNzL2Jlcm5pZS1zYW5kZXJzLWpvZS1tYW5jaGluLWJpZGVuLWFnZW5kYS9pbmRleC5odG1sP21pZD00NDQ2MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=fg-czaHiyOLIhxtBoPhx4A) that because 48 Democrats support the bill, so must every other Democrat.

The Biden administration is watching their number one priority go up in smoke because of internal division.
|
---
**Local: Get your school board out of the NSBA**
Way back in August, we released our how-to guide about attending a school board meeting, and how to be more effective when you attend. **We also included a nine-page section on the National School Boards Association (NSBA), as well as the National Association of State Boards of Education.** This was released long before the NSBA wrote their infamous letter to the DOJ, calling parents domestic terrorists for attending school board meetings and trying to hold them accountable.

Back in August, we were already aware of how bad these organizations are for children, parents, and the country. [**Please download our how-to guide and go to page 22**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0NDYzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=qHP4RCcaUFC8V23HSpqnnQ) to learn more about the NSBA and other associations that are radically left-wing, but purport to speak for you, and influence your schools more than you know. We have a list of action items, including getting your school board (and even your state association) to quit their membership of the NSBA. Already two state associations have done so. Let’s get more of them to do it, and collapse the association!

|
---
For months, most Americans have been aware that President Biden has become deeply unpopular. His policies on issues like Afghanistan, vaccine mandates and the economy have turned off most voters. Democrats are finally starting to get the memo and are [panicking](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvcHJlc3Mtc3VkZGVubHktZ3JhcHBsaW5nLXdpdGgtYmlkZW5zLXBvbGl0aWNhbC1zbGlkZS1hcy1kZW1vY3JhdHMtZ3Jvdy13b3JyaWVkP21pZD00NDQ2MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=bPog9ltq_AKYBgVX3aNYJg) about Biden's falling approval numbers. Biden's Press Secretary is even [trying to blame](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvcHNha2ktYmlkZW4tcmVhbGx5LXRlcnJpYmxlLXBvbGxzLWRlbHRhLXZhcmlhbnQtdW5hY2NpbmF0ZWQtYW1lcmljYW5zP21pZD00NDQ2MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=l8DURkjfAdMnaBjBnAF4yQ) the unvaccinated for Biden's declining numbers, but we know better.

[Biden is a divisive and deeply unpopular president, end of story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjkxLWEzMmFhNmI3ZWYwZjQwMGFiNDZlNzUwZjk5YWQzYThj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjLnVzL3RoZS1iaWRlbi1oYXJyaXMtaG9uZXltb29uLXdhcy1vdmVyLWV2ZW4tYmVmb3JlLWl0LWJlZ2FuLz9jYW1wYWlnbj1kYWlseS1uZXdzLWVtYWlsJTIwJm1pZD00NDQ2MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=4lXnxH1T2Uw5mia6dKQ2LA)
|

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We need to unite once again to secure necessary environmental protections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today marks 49 years since the passage of the Clean Water Act. This historic law was the first major piece of legislation to address water pollution across our nation, and it remains a vital tool in the fight to protect our nation's rivers, lakes, and streams to this day.

Many people may not know this, but the years before the Clean Water Act were a dark time for our environment. There was widespread concern over water contamination all across the nation, and, in 1969, the Cuyahoga River in Ohio caught on fire due to pollution and debris. People rose up to demand a change, and the Clean Water Act was born.

But the Clean Water Act cannot stand alone in the fight to protect water sources across the country. Our environment -- once again -- faces enormous challenges. And action is needed again -- just as it was 49 years ago. **We 've seen how big, bold legislation like the Clean Water Act has worked in the past, and now we must build upon its successes to demand better protections for our environment.**

**[If you're with me in the work to secure clean water and defend our natural resources, will you let me know by adding your name today? Public pressure led to the passage of the Clean Water Act in 1972, and public pressure can be used once again for further environmental protections.](https://act.myngp.com/el/g2fhn_AwW5-DbiXHhILMILHHllAFsy3ecQQz00LDwZ4=/Aj2-zKZqPcC5lDBnBXjHMlkcKAYabD_nbVqbAmxoNEk=?ms=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

I'm proud to be fighting for this type of legislation every day. Right now, Congress must act to pass legislation to support fish passage and recovery and protect endangered orca populations. Right now, Congress must pass legislation to ensure every American can drink clean drinking water free from lead. Right now, Congress must pass legislation to remove PFAS chemicals that are impacting wildlife and public health. _Right now_ , Congress must pass legislation to address the climate crisis and ocean acidification.

The need to protect our waters is urgent. Not only is clean water necessary for the health of our nation's wildlife, but it's essential for public safety and our local economies.

**[Will you join me today in calling on Congress to secure environmental protections to protect wildlife, natural resources, and our way of life? Add your name next to mine on today's anniversary.](https://act.myngp.com/el/g2fhn_AwW5-DbiXHhILMILHHllAFsy3ecQQz00LDwZ4=/Aj2-zKZqPcC5lDBnBXjHMlkcKAYabD_nbVqbAmxoNEk=?ms=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/g2fhn_AwW5-DbiXHhILMILHHllAFsy3ecQQz00LDwZ4=/4mPwUgxn9108l-l5saRE13aOjAn36ENuAhB-prA-sHA=?refcode=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211018_ClnWtr_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

clean_body: Peter, Today marks 49 years since the passage of the Clean Water Act. This historic law was the first major piece of legislation to address water pollution across our nation, and it remains a vital tool in the fight to protect our nation's rivers, lakes, and streams to this day. Many people may not know this, but the years before the Clean Water Act were a dark time for our environment. There was widespread concern over water contamination all across the nation, and, in 1969, the Cuyahoga River in Ohio caught on fire due to pollution and debris. People rose up to demand a change, and the Clean Water Act was born. But the Clean Water Act cannot stand alone in the fight to protect water sources across the country. Our environment -- once again -- faces enormous challenges. And action is needed again -- just as it was 49 years ago. We 've seen how big, bold legislation like the Clean Water Act has worked in the past, and now we must build upon its successes to demand better protections for our environment. ={{ContactData}} I'm proud to be fighting for this type of legislation every day. Right now, Congress must act to pass legislation to support fish passage and recovery and protect endangered orca populations. Right now, Congress must pass legislation to ensure every American can drink clean drinking water free from lead. Right now, Congress must pass legislation to remove PFAS chemicals that are impacting wildlife and public health. Right now , Congress must pass legislation to address the climate crisis and ocean acidification. The need to protect our waters is urgent. Not only is clean water necessary for the health of our nation's wildlife, but it's essential for public safety and our local economies. ={{ContactData}} It's an honor to represent you, Derek Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I want to be honest with you about something I believe is a damn shame
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The Philadelphia Inquirer just reported that our Republican opponent wrote themselves a $3 MILLION check to boost their campaign.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211018-3064-header&t=1&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)
Peter, in the last midterm election, 8-in-10 Senate races were won by the candidate who spent the most money.
I *really* wish it weren’t this way, but it's the truth. It takes a LOT of money to build a successful statewide campaign nowadays. That's why it's so disturbing to see things like this:
**_The Philadelphia Inquirer_****just reported that our Republican opponent gave themselves $3 MILLION to boost their campaign.** And they’re spending the first million right out of the gate on a big TV ad campaign statewide.
To put that in perspective, our _whole_ campaign raised $2.7 million over the last quarter. More than anyone else in Pennsylvania has raised in any quarter so far! We’ve had more than 150,000 people chip in. _But the fact stands that one self-funder candidate was just able to pour in their personal millions to instantly top our total._ 😩
In moments like this one, we gotta flex our campaign's muscle and answer GOP threats like this in a serious way.
[**_Will you help me respond directly to this massive $3 million GOP check by making a $5 donation right now? Every donation matters when we're up against deep-pocketed self-funders, so any support you can send our way would be so appreciated._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33248?refcode=em20211018-3064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33248?refcode=em20211018-3064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)**
**You just heard the bad news.** Our opponents are out here pouring $3 million at a time into their campaign coffers. So I am under no illusions that winning this race to flip this seat will be easy.
**But the good news is that we have the numbers on our side.** If everyone who reads my emails gave even a little bit, we could certainly compete with any self-funders on the other side.
I know it'd be outlandish to assume that folks could chip in each time we asked — we don't expect that at all. But that's what makes my team + me all the more grateful when yinz decide to kick a few bucks our way, you know?
[**_Add a $5 donation today to help us respond to this GIANT $3 million Republican cash surge. We can combat this huge influx of cash into the race — but only if we do it together and each pitch in what we can._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33248?refcode=em20211018-3064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33248?refcode=em20211018-3064&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)**
THANK YOU so much for hearing me out. Hope you have an amazing week. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211018-3064-footer&t=42&refcode2=3064_434096_fD1tlW&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=43&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=3064%2E434096%2EfD1tlW)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: We must end gerrymandering.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Republicans in the North Carolina legislature just released preliminary Congressional maps as part of the redistricting process.
#

Republicans in the North Carolina legislature just released preliminary Congressional maps as part of the redistricting process.
Unsurprisingly, they are trying to pass another extreme partisan gerrymander — even worse than the existing set of districts.
It is unjust, unfair, and not how democracy should work. That’s why we need a senator who will fight to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and end partisan gerrymandering. I will do just that, but first, I need your help to win this race.

name: Ras Smith
subject: The Deere strike. [UPDATE]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
My mom shouldn't have to worry about her health care, and every worker deserves a fair wage, health care, and retirement they can rely on. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37670193/312133487/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM1OTk2Zi01NjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4dQhBD43qDALffz3TQ4z4qJuMzSKrHCtk_c70BCekE=)
Friend,

As you probably know, workers at John Deere have been on strike for better wages and working conditions for almost a week now. What you may not know is that besides representing members of UAW Local 838 in the state legislature, the strike is also directly affecting my mother.

My dad worked on the line at John Deere for over 40 years, and my mom is one of the spouses of a retired employee who is also losing her health care.

For a company making record profits and increasing CEO pay, **they must do better.** The company has already posted historic profits of almost $5 billion dollars this year alone. My mom shouldn't have to worry about her health care, and every worker deserves a fair wage, health care, and retirement they can count on.

I've been out multiple times supporting the workers on strike who are reclaiming their power, but this is about so much more than John Deere and one strike. This is about shifting the balance of power back to workers. Corporations work because of workers, not the other way around.

**As a community -- it's not about Democrats or Republicans -- it's time to stand up for workers fighting for their rights. Today, I'm asking you to support our community and our neighbors:**

**[Will you add your name in support of the striking workers at John Deere? We'll keep you in the loop about other ways to stand in solidarity when you do.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37670200/312133492/136746040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM1OTk2Zi01NjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4dQhBD43qDALffz3TQ4z4qJuMzSKrHCtk_c70BCekE=&emci=1235996f-5630-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1335996f-5630-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37670203/312133499/136746040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM1OTk2Zi01NjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4dQhBD43qDALffz3TQ4z4qJuMzSKrHCtk_c70BCekE=&emci=1235996f-5630-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1335996f-5630-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21044445)**
---

My opponent Governor Kim Reynolds has remained mostly silent on the strike, preferring to instead talk about national issues like immigration.

It's clear where her priorities lie. We need leadership who isn't afraid to do the right thing. Too much is at stake for working families, small businesses, and farmers to let up now.

More soon,

clean_body: My mom shouldn't have to worry about her health care, and every worker deserves a fair wage, health care, and retirement they can rely on. | = Friend, As you probably know, workers at John Deere have been on strike for better wages and working conditions for almost a week now. What you may not know is that besides representing members of UAW Local 838 in the state legislature, the strike is also directly affecting my mother. My dad worked on the line at John Deere for over 40 years, and my mom is one of the spouses of a retired employee who is also losing her health care. For a company making record profits and increasing CEO pay, they must do better. The company has already posted historic profits of almost $5 billion dollars this year alone. My mom shouldn't have to worry about her health care, and every worker deserves a fair wage, health care, and retirement they can count on. I've been out multiple times supporting the workers on strike who are reclaiming their power, but this is about so much more than John Deere and one strike. This is about shifting the balance of power back to workers. Corporations work because of workers, not the other way around. As a community -- it's not about Democrats or Republicans -- it's time to stand up for workers fighting for their rights. Today, I'm asking you to support our community and our neighbors: | My opponent Governor Kim Reynolds has remained mostly silent on the strike, preferring to instead talk about national issues like immigration. It's clear where her priorities lie. We need leadership who isn't afraid to do the right thing. Too much is at stake for working families, small businesses, and farmers to let up now. More soon, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you'd like to make a contribution to Ras' grassroots campaign, please chip in = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Giffords.org
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
These numbers are staggering.
#

We just got the CDC’s newest report on gun violence and we wanted to share some important numbers with you:
**45,000** Americans were killed by guns in 2020, a level of gun deaths not seen in decades.
**15%** — That’s the percentage that gun deaths increased nationwide from 2019 to 2020. Our gun violence epidemic got worse through the pandemic.
**120** Americans on average were killed by guns every single day in 2020.
[**$3 — All it will take to help us save lives from gun violence. Pitch in at this link if you can.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211018-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1102_3935704_PNDm9j&akid=1102%2E3935704%2EPNDm9j)
These numbers are staggering. And the hardest part is that 45,000 isn’t just a number — that’s 45,000 sons, daughters, mothers, and fathers whose lives were cut short.
That’s why we are doing everything we can to pass background checks and other reasonable gun safety measures in order to save lives. And it’s why we have to ask:
[**Please make a $3 donation today. Your contribution will be put right to work helping to stop this staggering epidemic of gun violence in our country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211018-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1102_3935704_PNDm9j&akid=1102%2E3935704%2EPNDm9j)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211018-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1102_3935704_PNDm9j&akid=1102%2E3935704%2EPNDm9j)**
Thank you for your help in the fight.
Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1102%2E3935704%2EPNDm9j) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: These numbers are staggering. We just got the CDC’s newest report on gun violence and we wanted to share some important numbers with you: 45,000 Americans were killed by guns in 2020, a level of gun deaths not seen in decades. 15% — That’s the percentage that gun deaths increased nationwide from 2019 to 2020. Our gun violence epidemic got worse through the pandemic. 120 Americans on average were killed by guns every single day in 2020. These numbers are staggering. And the hardest part is that 45,000 isn’t just a number — that’s 45,000 sons, daughters, mothers, and fathers whose lives were cut short. That’s why we are doing everything we can to pass background checks and other reasonable gun safety measures in order to save lives. And it’s why we have to ask: Thank you for your help in the fight. Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Get vaccinated or starve
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58560948:6I7cSh2Nn:m:1:3253819041:156AE1786E6FB3769A51DEB60D1E03ED:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58560948:6I7cSh2Nn:m:1:3253819041:156AE1786E6FB3769A51DEB60D1E03ED:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58560948:6I7cSh2Nn:m:1:3253819041:156AE1786E6FB3769A51DEB60D1E03ED:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. clean_body: Setting up his campaign office in a local park known for criminal activity, drugs and gang violence. Setting up his campaign office in a local park known for criminal activity, drugs and gang violence. | Fellow Conservative, I'm running for Congress because I couldn't stand to watch Democrat Maxine Waters continue to represent a community, she DOES NOT LIVE IN. She knows nothing about the people she represents, yet she governs us from her mansion amongst the elites on the other side of town. And this got me thinking, I can't be the only one feeling that my Congressional representative is out of touch. Fellow Conservative, I'm so proud to see that not only do other people feel the same way, but other conservatives are also doing something about it. Enter Pastor Brian Hawkins of San Jacinto, California. He's a black conservative that grew up in the inner-city with close to nothing and achieved the American Dream! He's a proud pastor, father, city councilman and steadfast conservative dedicated to making his community better. Now, this next part struck me: Brian Hawkins decided to run for city council and set up his campaign office in a local park known for criminal activity, drugs and gang violence. This not only put a stop to the dealings in the park, but it gave Brian the opportunity to interface directly with his community and make a lasting impression on the young adults who frequent the park. Brian is a man of the people. He knows his community like the back of his hand and when he told me that his community is fed-up with out-of-touch Democrat rule in his district, his story became all too familiar. He's an inner-city resident with a conservative fire that that is unmatched. Brian's can't hold me back attitude is something the Left fears and doesn't want to face in DC. Just like me, Brian's a black conservative who backs the blue, supports small businesses and believes ALL LIVES MATTER. Brian will not only give this congressional district the conservative representation it deserves but he will also be a strong force nationwide as he campaigns for conservative policies that will put all Americans FIRST. Not to mention, sending TWO black conservatives to Washington \- Brian and myself \- will really put an end to the Democrats' stronghold on minority votes and racist Republican narrative they peddle day in and day out. Thank you, Joe E. Collins III CA congressional candidate Navy veteran FOLLOW BRIAN ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Carole King
subject: The only way to stop Trump is to win Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671020/312136281/-2023814932?refcode=20211018.7_CK_10EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2M0ZjE3ZC01ODMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HkgmDvuAQZ5dPjzxf4JIj0m8sfrCcHPdzBMV_GEQjU=)

| | Derek, Donald Trump is positioning himself to make a comeback in 2024. [**_Will you chip in right now to stop him?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671021/312136282/-2023814932?refcode=20211018.7_CK_10EL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2M0ZjE3ZC01ODMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7HkgmDvuAQZ5dPjzxf4JIj0m8sfrCcHPdzBMV_GEQjU=)

I don’t need to tell you how disastrous another Trump presidency would be for our country.

We cannot allow that to happen—and we have a chance to stop his comeback right now with the Virginia governor’s race.

Since we ousted Trump last year, the election in Virginia is the twice-impeached former president’s first chance to tout a big win for a Trumpian Republican, Glenn Youngkin.

Derek, I’m in this fight because I know that if we don’t do everything in our power to help Terry McAuliffe win in November, Citizen Donald will have all the momentum he needs to help Republicans take back Congress in 2022, God forbid — and the former president WILL launch his 2024 re-election campaign with GLEE!

We do not want to see Trumpian glee ever again. And that’s one of the reasons why I’m reaching out to you today on behalf of my friend Terry McAuliffe.

The main reason is that **Virginians deserve a proven leader, and that is Terry McAuliffe.**

Terry’s victory will reinforce the momentum of a substantial majority of Virginians in cities, suburbs, and small towns who care for and about each other. But it takes money to reach out to every voter in the caring majority, and Youngkin is spending millions to drown Terry out.

**Trumpism has no place in Virginia, let alone our country.**

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Donald Trump is positioning himself to make a comeback in 2024. = I don’t need to tell you how disastrous another Trump presidency would be for our country. We cannot allow that to happen—and we have a chance to stop his comeback right now with the Virginia governor’s race. Since we ousted Trump last year, the election in Virginia is the twice-impeached former president’s first chance to tout a big win for a Trumpian Republican, Glenn Youngkin. Derek, I’m in this fight because I know that if we don’t do everything in our power to help Terry McAuliffe win in November, Citizen Donald will have all the momentum he needs to help Republicans take back Congress in 2022, God forbid — and the former president WILL launch his 2024 re-election campaign with GLEE! We do not want to see Trumpian glee ever again. And that’s one of the reasons why I’m reaching out to you today on behalf of my friend Terry McAuliffe. The main reason is that Virginians deserve a proven leader, and that is Terry McAuliffe. Terry’s victory will reinforce the momentum of a substantial majority of Virginians in cities, suburbs, and small towns who care for and about each other. But it takes money to reach out to every voter in the caring majority, and Youngkin is spending millions to drown Terry out. Trumpism has no place in Virginia, let alone our country. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Last year, we all pitched in to elect compassionate and caring leaders with a history of working to lift people and communities. We worked tirelessly to defeat Trump, whose history was putting his own interest first. Derek, our progress will be in jeopardy if Virginians elect a Trumpkin to be their governor. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for doing whatever you can to help Terry win this crucial election. All my best to you and your family. – Carole = Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award and a Kennedy Center honor. Now Carole is using her platform to help Terry McAuliffe win in Virginia — and she actually did write this email. = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

clean_body: | | | | | Team -- it’s Eva. I wanted to share a conversation Gov. Sisolak and I recently had ahead of our mid-month deadline tonight: | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Hey Gov, I just pulled our mid-month fundraising report and wanted to share where we’re at. Eva Black | E S | Thanks, Eva! How’s it looking? Steve Sisolak As of today, we’re still about $2,427 away from hitting our mid-month goal. Eva Black | E S | I was hoping we’d be farther along by now since tonight is the deadline. Do you think we can catch up? Steve Sisolak The books close at midnight, so our best bet is counting on our email supporters to step in and help us. Eva Black | E S | I think this team can do it. Would you be able to reach out to them ASAP? Steve Sisolak That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally. Steve fully believes in the power of this team, and he knows that with your help we can reach our mid-month goal before tonight’s deadline. With 5 Republican opponents watching our every move, we can’t afford to miss this goal. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being part of this team. subject: That’s a lot of cash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |
---
Fellow American,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=43faec632e764d0893ae868c9fa8235f&_e=OdEwB_MdWrJ3O6uZorEW96dE6R97s5IpfkCfDD752yd-GGqvceqRdIfxOVav7SDDr4zo8ZPVCWL_xaJaKQvsUZPUcIve2taUGqYLSLqcIaqxI7vrQsTsxDDRhGeW7hmB-6SwG9htZ574bPxGqrGj40IBWkTr1YBfLp0PecUrsYAcTqpS2zDCMkSkX_G3Uj25xW2r9DcT5vsGDAspTTVfdPV4qgRyDFV39Yh4GS5HOSDzKcVD_iJNUckpy5WQVrfVMYxHT-rfymGlmhn3Ie0XZlAPrUDsbhvvRvGXyr36A1bv1F2Cqxy46Z6_FrrrAVInEiaTbGSwboKB-wKEwes54CCR7hTfeZ2Qw7HDniYEr3ur-hcJ5DYYbWNEaXgztetgkFvxPWctEcCX1k72MVZSRuZzWn8g8nd-TdhAJN_6ZA8jcunNvHFQcQTisHZg_26UVWZZWa8ZZzF28xcoyA_emDOqCc_BQQBRBuU_OioBoZI%3D)**

The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: **$9.5 MILLION in the last three months.**

Here's what one reporter tweeted:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=43faec632e764d0893ae868c9fa8235f&_e=OdEwB_MdWrJ3O6uZorEW96dE6R97s5IpfkCfDD752yd-GGqvceqRdIfxOVav7SDDr4zo8ZPVCWL_xaJaKQvsUZPUcIve2taUGqYLSLqcIaqxI7vrQsTsxDDRhGeW7hmB-6SwG9htZ574bPxGqrGj40IBWkTr1YBfLp0PecUrsYAcTqpS2zDCMkSkX_G3Uj25xW2r9DcT5vsGDAspTTVfdPV4qgRyDFV39Yh4GS5HOSDzKcVD_iJNUckpy5WQVrfVMYxHT-rfymGlmhn3Ie0XZq2d5eVunBq3XrNCi5EDZdjfHlpL9vaUoMKQAL0c243PDAkhYXn_kam4Xa4Ydp_SxXc7ftKbtkNbQvq4k-04ZFukYY9y2ymDVddE-EBcvBesjIBtK8wPpobLsDwqgxh4UtuV5lyDANbWV4cSNbh_EwQhwoFUGJMyqgsZbQI5oUdyuM2QwtF2SJtR_PkD5P_eUzMIboLv66GJAHwCdY9NW64%3D)
Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the _entire country_ - Republican or Democrat. And he already has **$17.2 million in his campaign war chest!**

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Fellow American, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country - Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Fellow American, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

2022 is a big opportunity. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671315/312137651/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVjODI5MC01YTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t-RNBXc7gg7a3YOo8bxDYTOmlCLQoPma314dIj8Vtg=&emci=60d08087-5a30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=e85c8290-5a30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)
Peter, From expanding our renewable energy economy and defending against climate change to expanding quality health care access in every corner of our state, **Democrats are committed to delivering for North Carolina.** That’s why our team is focused on expanding Democratic leadership in North Carolina’s legislature and beyond in next year’s critical midterm elections. But our work to elevate qualified Democrats is just the beginning: If we’re going to flip the legislature and elect leaders we can count on, we need your support. **[Will you split a donation of $30 or any amount that works for you between Team Cooper and the North Carolina Democratic Party to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671316/312137652/2004151191?refcode=em_RC_FR_NCDP_101821_L1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVjODI5MC01YTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t-RNBXc7gg7a3YOo8bxDYTOmlCLQoPma314dIj8Vtg=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671317/312137653/2004151191?refcode=em_RC_FR_NCDP_101821_B1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODVjODI5MC01YTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5t-RNBXc7gg7a3YOo8bxDYTOmlCLQoPma314dIj8Vtg=)

Peter, I’m proud of the work that our administration has done over the last five years, but I know that it’s not enough to have a Democratic governor in office.
**There’s so much more we could accomplish with partners in the legislature and in Washington who will support our agenda and help tackle our state’s most pressing issues.**
In 2022, we have the chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat from red to blue, we’re gaining a congressional district, and we’re going through the redistricting process — this gives us a real opportunity to take on far-right Republicans across the state.

clean_body: 2022 is a big opportunity. | Peter, From expanding our renewable energy economy and defending against climate change to expanding quality health care access in every corner of our state, Democrats are committed to delivering for North Carolina. | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde9aa1cb-46bb-4196-a634-8e712c6a9e02/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **Trump may be out of office, but his hand-picked Postmaster General (and top donor) is _still_ in power. ** Louis DeJoy was responsible for severe cuts that delayed mail delivery ahead of the November 2020 election, undermining confidence in vote-by-mail and attempting to help Trump steal the election. DeJoy has plans to make further cuts to the USPS and lengthen delivery times. He has every intention of running the USPS into the ground. We cannot allow him to continue to sabotage this essential service that millions of Americans rely on every day. If DeJoy is left in charge of the USPS, it will spell disaster for this crucial institution. [**Sign now to FIRE Louis DeJoy and save the U.S. Postal Service >> **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3080699c-27be-4737-aefe-ed949456cd65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

THEN: Instead of disgust -- _instead of pushback_ \-- his gross declaration was met with roaring applause!
