name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school.
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfmnf0jcjvsietdv247nohaogbg6c9l0k8g7qa7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf3rubr3n5bh40env2maqihouf59t5tlhk228avg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8b0b2v802i1r6o99bpfa0gb2l53lv06kbjpfgng_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zifupv60iaablrju6ta3kfk4s02d0en5cfhap20g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjufs0gaudhri4kvfqpfpimhoie0ndtvuoahgth0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zun8m59v2a760fc2bloam2pf0mt4ad7fcl2pebq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0fv9vq1p3qfq9pv2tmcud2gv05v928tte330u18_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqhlbckrau56h6oeoumb43klul1uobd0958aqrn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1s16qf7t71lmhksaedmcm7qe0udcn588ns14vkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze6lmlgkfhb7pmifojllikiev9u56ku8lqr671pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie4or4clh2bs)

Hi there, team — Over the last four years, Tribal communities, Coloradans and the American people have made clear: Bears Ears is a sacred place that should be protected. In 2016, I supported establishing Bears Ears as a national monument. In 2017, I called on then-President Trump to engage with Tribal leaders, including from the Ute Mountain Ute Tribe, but instead he reduced Bears Ears by 85%. After years of fighting to protect this land, we recently rolled back this Trump-era decision and restored Bears Ears National Monument to its original size. I was proud to reaffirm our commitment to protecting these sacred lands and to our tribes. I’ll continue to stand up for Colorado’s values and I appreciate your support, Michael

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfgbsn1bv39hb2pdmsl2dcbe353h6a15le4hnkto_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cliecpb4cph2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcmi79fk5db12os33kotcgbgk9e1gcjk3557a8bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cliecpb4cph2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zevstuimiofbmnfr24j2r82055v9g125vtbv0lko_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cliecpb4cph2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zil72049fgb7qoobhk9tnr94sm1dpr5j32to5al8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cliecpb4cph2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2z18mai7btu99kg70eopl0urerhnct50btr19q4n0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3aoltvot58idgjijfunugvce84kvio6k19ouv2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cliecpb4cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119 Arlington VA 22207 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m sincerely asking...

|
---

| | [**_I’m sincerely asking: will you add your name to endorse my campaign to flip this seat blue? If 1,000 supporters sign on, I’ll show everyone that I have the momentum to win this important race for Democrats. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to get my campaign off the ground. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671858/312139864/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889) I made it through my first public fundraising deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671859/312139867/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. I need 1,000 endorsements today to prove I have the support of voters, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671860/312139869/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889) | | [Endorse Tony!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671861/312139871/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)
---
I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got.
Endorsements like yours will help me get a running start to lift my grassroots campaign off the ground.
I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Congress.
[**_And right now I’m hoping you’ll have my back once more, with your endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671862/312139873/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671863/312139879/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)
---
[**_Tony_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671864/312139881/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)
[**_P.S. I was just endorsed by Latino Victory Fund -- the top Latino grassroots organizing group in the country. I’m so grateful to have the support of such an incredible organization. If 1,000 people join them and endorse me before midnight, it’ll be the largest wave of support my campaign has seen so far. I’d be honored to have your personal endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671865/312139883/958816626?source=20211018_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjBlMzM0Yi01ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PzYvRT-Oi6zQJTi3aVMfV_V-fNH5lQu2iidklAK1IjE=&emci=2c087f62-4c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fb0e334b-5d30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=19927889)

|

clean_body: I’m sincerely asking... | | | I made it through my first public fundraising deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. | | I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got. Endorsements like yours will help me get a running start to lift my grassroots campaign off the ground. I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Congress. body:
Roe v. Wade is under attack, Peter [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671955/312140595/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWUyZDIwZi01ZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuCzsii0QJx-U4SNYrZbgSEqnjmDDxR6Aje_s0YIEC4=&emci=df563ce3-5230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c5e2d20f-5e30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37671956/312140596/1264936948?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWUyZDIwZi01ZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yuCzsii0QJx-U4SNYrZbgSEqnjmDDxR6Aje_s0YIEC4=&emci=df563ce3-5230-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c5e2d20f-5e30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102) Peter —

Republicans across the country are trying to strip away reproductive rights. Just this year, 19 states have passed 106 restrictions on abortion — the highest number since Roe v. Wade.

Not only are these attacks dangerous, they’re wildly unpopular.

**In fact, 79% of Americans don’t want to see Roe v. Wade overturned.**

And I stand with every American who wants to see the protections affirmed in Roe v. Wade codified into law.

**Healthcare is a human right. And abortion is healthcare.

[Congress needs to take action to defend abortion rights. name: Team Schrier
subject: More than 400 voter suppression bills have been introduced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Since Democrats held the House and won back the Senate and White House last election, Donald Trump and his Republican followers have been working around the clock to attack voting rights. So far this year, more than 400 bills have been introduced in state legislatures across the country aimed at making it more difficult for people to vote. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672287/312142180/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWFlYmZjMy01ZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bLC7pFL-YkMbmItKDOGnNnle_PL1In6HY8j1lLBRoj4=&emci=0775c80b-2830-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=c5aebfc3-5e30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Since Democrats held the House and won back the Senate and White House last election, Donald Trump and his Republican followers have been working around the clock to attack voting rights. So far this year, more than **400 bills** have been introduced in state legislatures across the country aimed at making it more difficult for people to vote.

Kim knows how important it is that everyone has the chance to make their voices heard in our elections. That's why she and House Democrats passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA) earlier this year -- a bill she was an original co-sponsor of.

**The VRAA will restore key provisions of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 and ensure equal access to the ballot box for all Americans. name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and make sure voters hear my message loud and clear.
#
Senator Rosen said I could reach out, team:
In a minute I will ask you to make a critical donation to my campaign to help us catch up after a HUGE setback, but first let me explain:
Our campaign runs a lot of digital ads -- it’s one of the best ways we can compete against attacks from my opponents. When we had to take down events during my COVID quarantine, our numbers plummeted so we relied on digital ads to make up the difference.
**But when Facebook went down this month, our fundraising completely fell off a cliff. I’m not kidding -- we lost about $15,000. Now we’re scrambling to catch up. **
**[We’re running WAY behind on our monthly goal -- can I count on you to split a $5 to me and Jacky Rosen now to make up for lost ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672496/312143307/-1789173758?refcode=jr_em_nd_211018_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFlMDhhNC01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDmRK-S7OrtH15WqUKXqV3yRf_EQE_pCDdn1NG9_UXE=)**
My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and make sure voters hear my message loud and clear.
There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t flip this seat and expand the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will snatch back the gavel and plow forward with his dangerous agenda. We can’t afford that, folks.
**Ohio is standing in McConnell’s way but we won’t have a snowball’s chance in hell of winning this race if we get drowned out online by the GOP. That’s why I’m asking:**
**[Can I count on you to split $5 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen now to help us fuel our digital ads and flip this open Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672497/312143308/-1789173758?refcode=jr_em_nd_211018_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFlMDhhNC01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDmRK-S7OrtH15WqUKXqV3yRf_EQE_pCDdn1NG9_UXE=)**
Thank you for everything you do to power this campaign.
\-- Tim

clean_body: My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and make sure voters hear my message loud and clear. Senator Rosen said I could reach out, team: In a minute I will ask you to make a critical donation to my campaign to help us catch up after a HUGE setback, but first let me explain: Our campaign runs a lot of digital ads -- it’s one of the best ways we can compete against attacks from my opponents. When we had to take down events during my COVID quarantine, our numbers plummeted so we relied on digital ads to make up the difference. But when Facebook went down this month, our fundraising completely fell off a cliff. I’m not kidding -- we lost about $15,000. Now we’re scrambling to catch up. = My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and make sure voters hear my message loud and clear. There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t flip this seat and expand the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will snatch back the gavel and plow forward with his dangerous agenda. We can’t afford that, folks. Ohio is standing in McConnell’s way but we won’t have a snowball’s chance in hell of winning this race if we get drowned out online by the GOP. That’s why I’m asking: = Thank you for everything you do to power this campaign. \-- Tim =

name: Laurie Bishop
subject: What I’ve been up to this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672507/312143402/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
Friend, It’s been a busy October so far here on Team Bishop! As we move closer to the 2022 election and I continue traveling across Montana to meet with folks, I wanted to reach out and share some updates from the campaign trail with you. First, I kicked off the month by marching and speaking at the **March for Reproductive Rights in Helena** against the nationwide attacks on reproductive choice and Governor Greg Gianforte’s assault on Montanans’ constitutional right to an abortion. I have been voting against bogus abortion bills since 2017, and I’m committed to keeping up the fight in Congress. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672508/312143403/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
I was honored to get a tour of the new Family Promise Facility in Bozeman, an incredible project that will support homeless families for years to come. I also got to celebrate **Montana State University’s Homecoming** (go Cats!). I have so much love for this community and these people.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672509/312143404/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
Last week, I had an amazing experience honoring Montana’s first people. On Monday, I celebrated **Indigenous Peoples’ Day** with my friends at Western Native Voice, then I paid tribute to the contributions American Indians have made to our state and country on Peets Hill.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672510/312143405/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
I also joined **Montana State faculty and community members for the grand opening of the university’s new American Indian Hall** , a place for students to grow academically and spiritually for decades to come.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672511/312143406/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
Yesterday, we kicked off our **Building Back Better Community Tour** in Anaconda and Butte! Thank you to the community members and small business leaders who met with me and took the time to share the gems that make your communities special.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672512/312143407/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_img5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)
---
The opportunity to travel across this beautiful state, meet wonderful people, and listen to communities’ needs and concerns is such an honor. Thank you to everyone who has shared their vision for Montana with me so far. There is so much at stake this election cycle, and it’s the folks who show up and take the time to engage with their community who will make the difference in November.
**Together, we’re building a truly people-powered campaign that I know can rise up against our far-right opponent and his corporate-fueled war chest, and win in 2022.**
Thanks for being by my side in our journey to give Montana the leadership we deserve in Washington!
— Laurie
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672513/312143408/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_na_20211018highlights_lb_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyMGVjZS01ZjMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2_8VUDPNqVdJ7ndxljRV5aW_OjJvjfK7BTIl6ouj7g=)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OUTRAISED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |
---
Friend,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter – versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1uwyAQhJ-G3LAM2AYffEhiqv5JrZK0VU8WgU1Che0I40Z5--IozaGnIsThG3ZWM6aiGc8YzGxFU0pISgQRqWB5QpKlqCVZSFHnCyGJlChLW7VXSgfbd8qBD4nu29mhEvGwPC815coorYXZ7sodM4xrznSazVx1COE4IDZH9C7eAfToITnZzoOZTCILoFp8AD_oAzhsOx1ZrwPux-CVHcBg8-WxR-xuDG0z9KPXgFjt4RvRYkJatUdl912Et5koDTqCa7aiuZer9fJePjdSNvXjqnlZbvDL22Y1f1jLulnJ94leDVswdmzjNLTKut8tfRegC5F22uFPeXqqw_fH_DXKTeesicIfOFyg4QUxegfY5CLHmRIKK54RXHJKYauKEsp05itzPFnn7FDw2PZ-2nvpOEZzdneuEF8gSscxWlJ6qZP-x3j6TJfxDecj3Cavpsk1HkW8_gFDp6Gy)**

The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: **$9.5 MILLION in the last three months.**

Here's what one reporter tweeted:

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1uwyAQhJ-G3LAM_gEffEhiqraqVDVJc7UobGIqjC2MW-Xti6M0h54qoT18w85qRtc0Z3kGK1PTlBKSEk54yrMiIcmWN4JsBG-KDRdECJSnvTxLqYIZnLTgQ6KGftXVmpVKqzhyUlS8lIoReqryLGdMZlV5Wtm6C2GcULZG9CG-CdTsIfk2zoNeTCILIHvcgZ9UBxYbpyIbVMDDHLw0E2isPz32KHuYQ99Ow-wVoKzx8IVouSAl-1Gas4vwvhOlSUVwy1a2j2K33z6Kl1aItnneta_bA359P-zWT3vRtDtxXOjNsAdt5j5uQy-N_b0yuAAuROqUxeMbd11VHo_nKLfOGh2FP3C6wtgR0eoEWBe8wLnkEkuWE1wxSuFDlhVU6crXevw21pqpZLHt83L32nGMZs3pUiO2QZTOc7Sk9Fon_Y_x8plu4wyXEe6bN9PkFo8i1vwAI9yg3Q)
Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the _entire country_ – Republican or Democrat. And he already has **$17.2 million in his campaign war chest!**

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Friend, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter – versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country – Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Friend, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country – so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Hey Peter, it’s Stewart. I wanted to write to you quickly to ask if you’ll pitch in $5 or $10 to our Flip the First Fund before tomorrow night? You see, I believe that a representative should work on behalf of the folks they represent regardless of their party. The whole idea is making people’s lives better and giving our children more opportunities than we had. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672617/312144009/2093365186?refcode=211018-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODUzN2FkZi02MDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PuECUADjutERTS_NyK_JgzF8n62BEeJCtIu0FnzDmwQ=) Hey Peter, it’s James. I wanted to write to you quickly to ask if you’ll **[pitch in $5 or $10 to our Flip the First Fund before tomorrow night?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37672618/312144010/-565500061?refcode=211018-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODUzN2FkZi02MDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PuECUADjutERTS_NyK_JgzF8n62BEeJCtIu0FnzDmwQ=)** The First District deserves a representative who works on behalf of the people -- not special interests. The whole idea is to make your lives better! Right now, that isn’t happening in VA-01. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Where is Mark Zuckerberg?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=46gRYDCvKSIFsiVrpsDnfro6fdj8CakU&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
It's time for Mark Zuckerberg to come out from behind his screen and sit in front of my Senate committee to answer for the damage Facebook is doing to our kids and our country.
Just the other week, a courageous whistleblower - former Facebook product manager Frances Haugen - revealed to the world that the social media giant knowingly and consistently prioritizes profits over the safety of its users. Haugen's testimony and trove of documentation demonstrate how Facebook amplified misinformation and hateful rhetoric, and - chillingly - buried information suggesting that their products harm kids' mental health and well-being.
In the days since the bombshell testimony, Zuckerberg has dismissed Haugen in a demeaning statement, sent his PR team to repeat generalities, and made no commitment to real action. He has offered no apologies, no admissions, no acknowledgement. He takes no responsibility, and yet Mark Zuckerberg is responsible.
**Let's be clear: The buck for Facebook stops with Mark Zuckerberg, the platform's founder and CEO. It's time for him to address what he will do to keep his platform safe for its _billions_ of users. But I need your help to hold Zuckerberg accountable.**
You see, on the one hand, Facebook's leaders __say__ Congress should pass reforms to make social media safer. But on the other hand, they unleash millions of dollars, armies of lobbyists and lawyers, and blizzards of ads to do the complete opposite. Only through open, honest congressional testimony can we get to the bottom of Zuckerberg's actions and compel him to take action.
**That 's why I'm looking for 750 supporters to join me in holding Mark Zuckerberg accountable, and I need you to speak out before a hard and fast deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight. Click here to make your voice heard now:**
**[Demand Facebook's Mark Zuckerberg testify before Congress](https://surveys.signforgood.com/Blumenthal-Facebook?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1082-su-nd)**
Make no mistake, this is a moment of reckoning for Facebook on par with what happened with Big Tobacco. Back then, Big Tobacco deceived the public about their own internal data proving the health dangers of smoking, just like Facebook is trying to hide their own research about the dangers of their product. As Connecticut's attorney general, I led and won a 46-state lawsuit holding Big Tobacco accountable for their wrongdoing. Now, I'm determined to hold Facebook accountable.
I'm grateful to have you fighting with me.
Thanks for all you do,
Dick

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)
clean_body: Friend, It's time for Mark Zuckerberg to come out from behind his screen and sit in front of my Senate committee to answer for the damage Facebook is doing to our kids and our country. Just the other week, a courageous whistleblower - former Facebook product manager Frances Haugen - revealed to the world that the social media giant knowingly and consistently prioritizes profits over the safety of its users. Haugen's testimony and trove of documentation demonstrate how Facebook amplified misinformation and hateful rhetoric, and - chillingly - buried information suggesting that their products harm kids' mental health and well-being. In the days since the bombshell testimony, Zuckerberg has dismissed Haugen in a demeaning statement, sent his PR team to repeat generalities, and made no commitment to real action. He has offered no apologies, no admissions, no acknowledgement. He takes no responsibility, and yet Mark Zuckerberg is responsible. Let's be clear: The buck for Facebook stops with Mark Zuckerberg, the platform's founder and CEO. It's time for him to address what he will do to keep his platform safe for its billions of users. But I need your help to hold Zuckerberg accountable. You see, on the one hand, Facebook's leaders say Congress should pass reforms to make social media safer. But on the other hand, they unleash millions of dollars, armies of lobbyists and lawyers, and blizzards of ads to do the complete opposite. Only through open, honest congressional testimony can we get to the bottom of Zuckerberg's actions and compel him to take action. That 's why I'm looking for 750 supporters to join me in holding Mark Zuckerberg accountable, and I need you to speak out before a hard and fast deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight. Click here to make your voice heard now: Make no mistake, this is a moment of reckoning for Facebook on par with what happened with Big Tobacco. Back then, Big Tobacco deceived the public about their own internal data proving the health dangers of smoking, just like Facebook is trying to hide their own research about the dangers of their product. As Connecticut's attorney general, I led and won a 46-state lawsuit holding Big Tobacco accountable for their wrongdoing. Now, I'm determined to hold Facebook accountable. I'm grateful to have you fighting with me. Thanks for all you do, Dick

subject: Open for the cutest baby pics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re celebrating the growth of Erica’s family today!
#
We have exciting news to share!
**This October, Erica became a GRANDMOTHER!!**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22477?t=1&akid=556%2E3698%2E32irW8)
Erica’s granddaughter, Kemani, was born on October 6, 2021. Erica has been spending the last few weeks with her children and her new grandchild!
That being said, with just a few months until our primary election, we've been BUSY at Erica Smith HQ working to meet our end-of-month fundraising goal and power our U.S. Senate campaign forward. [** _Can you make a donation of $5 today so that we can keep up our fundraising efforts while Erica is out spending quality time with her new grandchild?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22477?t=2&akid=556%2E3698%2E32irW8)

**Erica is in this fight for not only folks who are currently navigating America’s system, but for kids like Kemani.** This fight goes beyond us. We’re in this to make a better North Carolina, a better country, and a better world for the next generation to inherit.
That’s why Erica is committed to not taking a dime of super PAC or fossil fuel money. [**_Can you make a donation to our people-powered movement today to keep Erica fighting for a better North Carolina for folks big and small?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22477?t=22&akid=556%2E3698%2E32irW8)
Together,
Team Erica Smith

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: A headline you’re going to love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila is leading the charge to deliver on the Democratic agenda.
#
Peter, the New York Times recognizes what a pivotal role Pramila is playing right now in Congress:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7870?refcode=em20211018-729&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=729%2E420207%2E2vXZG-)
**[If you’re fully in this fight alongside Pramila to pass the Build Back Better Act and invest in working families and climate action, please chip in $3 now. We can’t give in to the corporate lobbyists who are trying to stop us.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7870?refcode=em20211018-729&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=729%2E420207%2E2vXZG-)**
While Big Pharma, Wall Street, and other corporate interests try to remove every cornerstone policy of President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act, Pramila is leading the fight in Congress to pass a strong, visionary, and transformative bill.
Voters want action to address the climate crisis. They want to make long-overdue investments in childcare, paid leave, Medicare expansion, affordable housing, pre-K, community college, and a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers. And they want to pay for this by making sure that corporations and the ultra-rich finally pay their fair share.
Wall Street, corporations, and their special interest lobbyists don’t want us to succeed. That’s why it’s up to Pramila and our movement to preserve the Build Back Better Act and deliver for the people. **Pramila is leading the way and we hope you’ll continue standing with her at this make or break moment.**
**[Peter, can you contribute $3 to support Pramila’s fight to deliver on President Biden’s agenda? We need all hands on deck to pass the Build Back Better Act, and get relief to the people and our planet.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7870?refcode=em20211018-729&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=729%2E420207%2E2vXZG-)**

Team Jayapal

subject: The latest:

body:
"marquee matchup"
| | |
---
**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was just endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our next big fundraising deadline at midnight, my team and I need to raise another $15,000 to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8838%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZgVwWbyeRm1eDpjq4Fj5NA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FGZz7LtzB3mu2Rd8%2fgNxgA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=up6iNUM6apEf%2b1SyMKJMfw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CrSkcDt7VRuHRr5Zvggjgw&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8838%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ZgVwWbyeRm1eDpjq4Fj5NA&sysid=1)_

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Will you please sign on and personally endorse Alex Padilla? It would mean a lot to Alex and to all of us to have your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
When we win this race and send Alex back to the Senate, it will be because people like you got involved.
#

From reforming our broken immigration system to protecting voting rights from Republican attacks, Alex is working hard in the Senate to pass progressive policies so that ALL Californians have the opportunity to succeed.
But the truth is, the same far-right Trump supporters behind the Recall attempt are going to be coming after Alex next, and we need to be ready.
They’d love nothing more than to replace California’s first Latino U.S. Senator with an anti-immigrant, anti-science, anti-vaccine Republican who will fall in line behind Mitch McConnell.
As long as we stand together, we are going to win this race and keep Alex in the Senate fighting for immigration reform, action on climate change, and universal health care. **But it’s only going to work if Alex has a big team fighting alongside him, so we are asking:**
[**Will you please sign on and personally endorse Alex Padilla? It would mean a lot to Alex and to all of us to have your support.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Oct21?source=em211018-1-15&akid=398%2E159979%2E23UCCN)
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Oct21?source=em211018-1-15&akid=398%2E159979%2E23UCCN)
Endorsing Alex and being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for people — not corporations — and defending the dream that so many of us are striving for.
And that’s important, because the best way to win this election and make sure we keep Alex in the senate is with an unprecedented grassroots movement of supporters like you.
So thank you in advance for your support. When we win this race and send Alex back to the Senate, it will be because people like you got involved.
\- Team Padilla
**[ENDORSE ALEX](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-Oct21?source=em211018-1-15&akid=398%2E159979%2E23UCCN)**

body:
I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who took a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3c411b2d380f4598b4c4116cb962759b&_e=au0cjY9QD_lOGJQ18iGl2C4iToMWO2_3rXT2ePYcaEnIrdUpQ5umqq6P0IghfWU1JsbBZE6yrPVL-I-5GMM97IzgKcXG-qnE6aB6r5psHkBLKdlkqxJrOIeOQxIYU146esMeN3L09WcJO_1dGOQ5qRTVsM_FSbAhImXK_izbaUtoTYnBOOYS4gs3DHDjdNrgwDjqlyHZVlqEIlhDF-fj0XGZV-9wgvyTXCWNK1o1ZYiGdEoAnm47zd-dnrWciKp9zfy0jX5UBzAbpLvz5LWghIWTRl1w3Y43tWFLcfKEle8cH1hGgAhKAcCBy-yken_y-3OVIw1y2664Ri8zVGe1eZogyQQsUu8gCCqFUrv0rr7dNdb-7EhActVNc3mnFhIP_pkPhFTY2CHjCQIkUbIXrEvabmY4xBSTwgr1P9jJx3fa-0foSuuN9Rj9rly7NOZRrb8K70iPO2gQH0AN3OzfAg%3D%3D)

Peter,

My name is Yvette Herrell. I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election.

Friend, the stakes of our race for governor just skyrocketed – and we have to take them extremely seriously.
**The Supreme Court's failure to intervene in Texas' horrific anti-abortion law is a disgrace – or, as Justice Sotomayor called it, "a breathtaking act of defiance" of the Constitution. And now, our extremist opponent is following in Doug Ducey's (R) footsteps by calling for a similar abortion ban _right here in Arizona._**
**I refuse to stand by while Arizona Republicans bring the worst of other states' extremism to our doorstep so they can strip millions of women of their rights. I'm running for governor to build a state that works for all people – but I can't hold GOP extremists back by myself. I need you with me, friend. [Can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help me flip Arizona blue, defeat GOP extremism and defend reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674380/312150111/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk270-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDYxMzIwYy02YzMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=78clqIxyLO087VcRhR6uXV6pK80VcncRIFh5S1ArXrc=)**

We elect leaders to protect and expand our rights – never to take them away. Yet when our extremist GOP opponent saw Texas leaders attacking reproductive rights and denying abortion access, she said, _"Well done, Texas. Arizona next."_
**Let me be clear: If we flip Arizona and I become governor, I will absolutely not be taking my cues from the draconian anti-choice "leaders" who just ripped away a woman's right to choose in Texas. I'll take them from Arizona voters – a majority of whom support Roe v. Wade. **
But Arizona is already 2022's top battleground, and POLITICO says the Republican establishment is piling up MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me – to defeat our movement. **I'm not waiting on some shady megadonors in the wings to power our campaign. * * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. name: American Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8839%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=twQJ2cWDxuOB%2fj%2f3020HNw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16577%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HhPTAzF86z4zM5njMB4M7g&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16578%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YkONQ13F62VTjwrpGgSuxw&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16578%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YkONQ13F62VTjwrpGgSuxw&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16578%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YkONQ13F62VTjwrpGgSuxw&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8839%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=twQJ2cWDxuOB%2fj%2f3020HNw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8839%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=twQJ2cWDxuOB%2fj%2f3020HNw&sysid=1)

name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Freedom means no VACCINE MANDATES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the mili
_Sponsored message_
Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdvpbe6nr7o3vl6gtsr7ghisusrnjok3otftjlqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbhb77qfkh238825dlkvmnudu38qh7i31vtgpp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpvol6vfsd5126lctojcf30aaoo32beifa9jjua8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: {{email}}

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 16th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkg16btgkrci9rafgti7jihql6aprn6qfnrea7uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmefboeh9ard43aurhce4h1r3m9buk1fos8j9hco_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zroc6e61jl21hev6v0f0d46cb67kas662a0646o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosh1asta73i76unp1esv0h2g6c80024ngqgcrg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1clie9o72c1h2bs)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Angel Lara
subject: this is long, but I’m hoping you’ll read it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angel Lara for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674431/312150467/1153975220?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS85MTgxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA1MDE3My02ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nx2ZSyVV-_kjEHTtP6UiClsmA4DYlrCHmDPYbnuF8s=)
---
This email is long, but my district could be a top pickup opportunity for Democrats in 2022, so it’s important.

But before I tell you more about my decision to run for one of the most competitive seats in the country, **I wanted to first tell you how important it is for me to have the support of people like you.**

CA-21 is currently held by Republican David Valadao, but he only won his seat by 0.8 points, making him one of the most vulnerable Republicans in the country.

While it makes this seat a prime pickup for Democrats, _Republicans will not let it go without a hard and expensive fight._ So I need the support from people like you to help me win here and keep our Democratic House Majority.

[**_This seat is inches away from being flipped, so I need your help. Would you chip in $3 to help me take this seat from Republicans? » _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674432/312150468/1451588485?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=ALFC_20211018_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS85MTgxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA1MDE3My02ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nx2ZSyVV-_kjEHTtP6UiClsmA4DYlrCHmDPYbnuF8s=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674439/312150475/1451588485?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=ALFC_20211018_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS85MTgxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA1MDE3My02ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nx2ZSyVV-_kjEHTtP6UiClsmA4DYlrCHmDPYbnuF8s=)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674440/312150476/1451588485?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=ALFC_20211018_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS85MTgxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA1MDE3My02ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nx2ZSyVV-_kjEHTtP6UiClsmA4DYlrCHmDPYbnuF8s=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37674441/312150477/1451588485?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=ALFC_20211018_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS85MTgxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA1MDE3My02ZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nx2ZSyVV-_kjEHTtP6UiClsmA4DYlrCHmDPYbnuF8s=)
I’m the child of immigrants and a Central Valley native, so I have seen how hard Americans must work to pay for school, their healthcare, and housing.

For me, I was fortunate enough that my hard work resulted in a scholarship to the University of California, but I know that not everyone is afforded the same opportunities.

I chose to run for Congress because I want every American to have equal opportunity, meaning affordable housing, healthcare, and schooling options.

**Joe Biden won this district by 10 points.** When I saw that, I knew this district was winnable by a Democrat if enough resources and people banded together to flip it.

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Peter, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country - Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Peter, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: I am a proud pro-Trump Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a congressional seat from the Democrats in the last election. I’m afraid if we don’t stay on track, this seat will be vulnerable to the radical-Left and all our work to flip it last cycle will be for nothing. | BREAKING: Fellow Conservative - The news just broke: progressive Democrat Gabe Vasquez announced today he is running against me in New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District - the seat I flipped from the Democrats last cycle. The Left will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards unseating any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way - starting with ME. Now that I have a challenger that has access to the Democrat Machine and their limitless pocketbooks, You may not live in New Mexico, but I need you to invest in my reelection race for one big reason, Fellow Conservative... Democrats are gunning for our incumbent House members across the nation to derail our momentum in the fight to take back the House. If we lose even a single Republican seat, the math gets tougher and tougher for us to flip the House and finally FIRE Nancy Pelosi. New Mexico - and our country - cannot afford to have another Democrat like Vasquez who blindly supports Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’s radical liberal policies. Simply put - if the Democrats gain back control of this seat, we will see the seemingly endless list of crises facing our citizens worsen here in New Mexico and across the nation. We can put an end to the Democrats’ thinly-veiled attempts to fundamentally alter our entire nation - but to do so, we need to elect a Republican majority. Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Dear Peter,
Last week, I spoke with John Solomon on Real America's voice about the treacherous policies buried within the $3.5 TRILLION reconciliation bill.
There has been so much pushback against this bill because American Patriots are already feeling the inflationary impacts of President Biden’s reckless spending spree.
My team has been finding all sorts of nasty policies hidden inside, but we are specifically focusing on President Biden's plan for a "Green New Deal."

name: Herschel Walker
subject: That’s a lot of cash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8833%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=n4rY6wWAu3OPfjY9mXJnUg&sysid=1)
|
---
Fellow American,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16571%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BOMtdzCM9lixtxbLX6bcnw&sysid=1)**

The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: **$9.5 MILLION in the last three months.**

Here's what one reporter tweeted:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16572%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BeuhvKnCX8q3eMeXkJBkCA&sysid=1)
Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the _entire country_ - Republican or Democrat. And he already has **$17.2 million in his campaign war chest!**

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

Fellow American, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. **[We need your support today so that we can continue building momentum to WIN THIS RACE.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16573%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gEihPswfOsBdmQ8RQE2w5Q&sysid=1)**

[**Chip in $10 →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16574%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bBqRx9f4VJBlx6HeZjZ3Pw&sysid=1)
[**Chip in $34 →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16585%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t0iuotlayQ0Jk6USin2ofQ&sysid=1)
[**Chip in _MORE_ →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16586%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bRnj9OXXRdO1NEVXTjXN9Q&sysid=1)
The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you.

**[I hope to hear from you soon.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16587%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o0Z3up%2fth4Bt%2fDJxwNJZaw&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16572%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BeuhvKnCX8q3eMeXkJBkCA&sysid=1)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

[**Donate Today →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16588%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zJ4UdjSO57uwjmxQa15sfQ&sysid=1)

[](https://) Peter, In case you missed it, Jane Timken absolutely dominated the first GOP Senate forum last week and her grassroots supporters simply [took over the venue!](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d14db8f3f80b470bb8ee942ce8970020&_e=VfQVkEAtgb_qZ5AA9g_tv2eY7JLE3Bb0FNqd4UzSjk9hrVaARLeOJckLnMEVX6ePetN7vtwBF7b8JrsxT21ef_OGy2zoLOXVB59VvPCW4znD_W33TfTB5OBuRk6ofD4uqHBL9yx3-IrtAlPJ7kw1oI7jH0QudDraIhIFdAHvVD5JdFI5E903HKfQjDmELdVsK1l1OzmG8kn6scwrqKMhwanDZGGoqXQ27UR-HfL8GsUJEqnW6IAa2aTxiGGRgowMNiDHxV6xNFVJRHo6rxS_NYvMNy-lxbrmCRkd3dA8M1dZPWihpJASGtAG8GrH8udu) This Sunday, October 24th, Jane will be speaking at yet another Senate forum in Columbus. [Purchase a ticket here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d14db8f3f80b470bb8ee942ce8970020&_e=VfQVkEAtgb_qZ5AA9g_tvzucnQXySvgWpe2r3RujAQGoZxaUsM3wcsUtSs0pGrmSHfzCN4_d2DXeMsVBBHVs6pd3J9zmwg7lapm2hqMCMBiLaRkNP0vtNmzLTIFdv1GuBd8ukugl_XVeSf6It47_5pk2GXTarChCagvZx-jO-43tVFQRLwpSNtJmg7CYimxkFsIT1eLPMtKfWBgSrc0jc2umO3nMQcqe_XbOb47UT8q2Nj9a8MjRGObEbkN4qJPfzKjpMhqaFplcgcGgd603MoQmYEI6HxRVSiJO8Pyl420%3D), and join our team on site for a free Timken Tailgate with local elected officials, supporters, food and a livestream of all the action! Click the button below to sign up! **Timken Tailgate** Sunday, October 24th 5:30 PM Genoa Baptist Church, 7562 Lewis Center Rd, Westerville, OH 43082 [**Timken Tailgate RSVP**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d14db8f3f80b470bb8ee942ce8970020&_e=VfQVkEAtgb_qZ5AA9g_tv1K12kDLjlWO9JVQum8jTUOFf5qjq3DS1XlDJumJ8JRDbE9fLNomA1Iv8vSWtftQth0lIm0dJg-jOsYrO6KwcECIJDBb2FA7Z_O1Aae50JsuuBxu-isApuMvtsDF0qKz9GXmZlyoH2aVG-sP306BxYbpP4JlHQbq1j_I4LQBFKJz1fVcW1V1PSZdsKbjx4rhaBDi6tdwiz9UqWBtVsx-tgeyCtr_hwZQNZ3y093tnc8P8vujnR4LcKM7hWSohGZ32BD1b5T7G6AjEaHrod2GniYcqyn3JNmoL37SJngPfoxVX010qXTvgK-KYtuLBWX9uV0r33BEPYwEcGPeM5XuFoY%3D) In addition to all the Senate forums, our campaign is maintaining a ferocious pace on the ground and you will not want to miss what we have planned for this fall! In just over two weeks, former NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik returns to the Buckeye state to tout Jane's support for Ohio's law enforcement over two days during our upcoming [Weekend of Action](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=d14db8f3f80b470bb8ee942ce8970020&_e=VfQVkEAtgb_qZ5AA9g_tv1K12kDLjlWO9JVQum8jTUOFf5qjq3DS1XlDJumJ8JRDpWrnVRNQ4LfKxddjh_brq6Bv-HX0OKb2kx5lBVvGoq9ILB6grt3ZZ990H-AXaMZscQ7j-ElB4p_x-xi7t36BbBJ4uJ8bBO0UiCvFyY03RyItXvMCBkFxzPsj8ioHDMXh4fj7hHNhOe_TlBwGEUw3uyztRjUbrS5zR-4wuun5oXtPq6O1bqnMGeZVNZNhxizNADbDNjNeDsALwUzLiiSS3b4avR-LxhhUJHlv16BKr9PiMWKmZBp2Y97DC95JJlO86dAEWKSqAP5ZWROyQKV4omoAE940D7xsh3841651sXA%3D). **Win the Streets** _Featuring Commissioner Kerik & Jane Timken_ Friday, November 5th 5:00 PM L.E.P.D.
