disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
It’s Jack here, I wanted to thank you so much for being a part of this campaign and this journey with me as I work to become your next Congressman for | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b34e56d998514ec2a26248c01a670955&_e=8lN0jCU7MdTArrXaZq12MK_RZFRToRM7s5hN3Brn4sEWnThlnhnk5SLxMgMeMHadcSPsBw0jstUy_Wxfk7PxaH9rFm7LmvQN2SdKguvZsYSI2QbNH-MFLc6gTCsIr3Eg9ADJbwcFOkRdq7BqfXhLVQ-qXmk3pLGIQ3tV59swi0L5TOdrCQBY_B4cGSD_fV6Vs-glBrbEAL8nedBq6CJo_O_9riJLFRBUoO8xnv7QVFzNvKf7ney0bMlBRE_pmY4Bl4AnvutOEMmZ_A3y-AGv6Tpdqs-lOhuw9E3-F5lzfhtOfCT2cVcuutnV7TY1YDIHfsFPxbGiFYID2sHfXWUGxrXzeaO8sLajT9Y7ICbY9PTGx2_sWW6Dgzpzn7fSutgrAKJ50OaJMINRznIsOHtuyRzYSawbzd3yATXe8JtnrLVNzG7nt-1FcH0xvOggMLj5m7anborwSzhnWT5vRNTHAbgA7HPZVWltKyacIZRHZmk%3D) Friends, It’s Jack here, I wanted to thank you so much for being a part of this campaign and this journey with me as I work to become your next Congressman for Montana’s First District, representing the eastern part of the state. No doubt about it, this is going to be a long and difficult road. We know the challenges facing our state right now: skyrocketing real estate prices, lack of access to quality affordable healthcare, a climate crisis leading to some of the worst wildfires our state has ever seen, and a pandemic that continues to ravage our state and nation. We need to strengthen our economy by crushing the pandemic and getting folks back to work. We need to create new jobs by combating the climate crisis. And we need to make sure Montanans can get to a hospital without breaking the bank, and helping folks get ahead by providing everyone with a shot at a good education. The road is rather simple, but the work is going to be hard. Our representation in Washington has failed Montana for too long. I intend to change that. **[I’m going to do right by our state and district, but I need your help. That’s why I’m asking you to become a Founding Donor for my campaign by chipping in $50 today.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b34e56d998514ec2a26248c01a670955&_e=8lN0jCU7MdTArrXaZq12MK_RZFRToRM7s5hN3Brn4sEWnThlnhnk5SLxMgMeMHadcSPsBw0jstUy_Wxfk7PxaH9rFm7LmvQN2SdKguvZsYSI2QbNH-MFLc6gTCsIr3Eg9ADJbwcFOkRdq7BqfXhLVQ-qXmk3pLGIQ3tV59swi0L5TOdrCQBY_B4cGSD_fV6Vs-glBrbEAL8nedBq6CJo_O_9riJLFRBUoO8xnv7QVFzNvKf7ney0bMlBRE_pmY4BImu5hK7-lq60FqaacAiNzWyBNCJ9PRJuVGxxBrJfTInOM6e7_EmvvsE-tA9SRlGbESaG6WwYOFHrogt0OxYYXG89r93ctHSZfLoeRRGb9Wcfr8Ih1QBdpJiSEOoB-Ur8CX0pqRUAWTfxZyyuQ6Isldad7f2luzl91JnAQUJLJ7ajPgs-F1PqUPgcLTWDGb5QUPzz3dZTcrIxcodRovaiS4-u5YZr6F9bYOOvmjbw8LVHLciiHy8s4hcHoQ9Q6Vxb)** [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=b34e56d998514ec2a26248c01a670955&_e=8lN0jCU7MdTArrXaZq12MK_RZFRToRM7s5hN3Brn4sEWnThlnhnk5SLxMgMeMHadcSPsBw0jstUy_Wxfk7PxaH9rFm7LmvQN2SdKguvZsYSI2QbNH-MFLc6gTCsIr3Eg9ADJbwcFOkRdq7BqfXhLVQ-qXmk3pLGIQ3tV59swi0L5TOdrCQBY_B4cGSD_fV6Vs-glBrbEAL8nedBq6CJo_O_9riJLFRBUoO8xnv7QVFzNvKf7ney0bMlBRE_pmY4Bl4AnvutOEMmZ_A3y-AGv6QcrwsW9n9B7Id_tieufpZ6jDckRAbDaPaZPFIpT1pAa1Z8U927UuMmP0JhKTTDYD0ARQw8I37JQcI3K_KNTbm_YX-ntW8UQ2JUkVVs7TygQv_fbDqme_jz9dPDVGQW2TXSSCWIn1a6uA8uyWKnCe4-1-zuQc_fLqGSB2C_y1cNcYg4xIQ-gbdeBZvkG7VZlgmTkF5SuXoY8lCs6gUWTpZo%3D) Montana deserves better than Matt Rosendale. clean_body: It’s Jack here, I wanted to thank you so much for being a part of this campaign and this journey with me as I work to become your next Congressman for | | | Friends, It’s Jack here, I wanted to thank you so much for being a part of this campaign and this journey with me as I work to become your next Congressman for Montana’s First District, representing the eastern part of the state. No doubt about it, this is going to be a long and difficult road. We know the challenges facing our state right now: skyrocketing real estate prices, lack of access to quality affordable healthcare, a climate crisis leading to some of the worst wildfires our state has ever seen, and a pandemic that continues to ravage our state and nation. We need to strengthen our economy by crushing the pandemic and getting folks back to work. We need to create new jobs by combating the climate crisis. And we need to make sure Montanans can get to a hospital without breaking the bank, and helping folks get ahead by providing everyone with a shot at a good education. The road is rather simple, but the work is going to be hard. Our representation in Washington has failed Montana for too long. I intend to change that. Montana deserves better than Matt Rosendale. I intend to help lead us into a better future for all Montanans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Thanks for standing with me. \-- Jack Ballard Candidate for Congress in CD-01 Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and CD-01 in Washington D.C. **** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

| | Derek, Terry’s in trouble, and Trumpism is on the rise in Virginia.

Don’t believe me? Just look at the polls! Almost every poll out of the Virginia Governor’s race has the election a statistical tie -- **with Youngkin even _ahead_ in three recent polls!!**

body:
| | | This email is not easy for me to write.

But I need to be completely honest with you, so I'll be blunt:

House Republicans have a shocking $2 MILLION cash advantage over my Democrats.

****[So let me be clear: If we're not able to close the gap and compete with the GOP's massive piles of cash, our Democratic House Majority could be doomed. I'll fight to stop that from happening if it's the last thing I do, but I need you by my side. We've worked too hard and come too far to let Republicans defeat our Majority now. Can I count on your immediate $3 to defend my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2sp3V_2B_)****
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)[**PENDING**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)[
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

---

I need you to remember how hard we worked -- together \-- to win this Majority.

And I need you to remember how many lives have improved because of it.

I know we will never forgive ourselves if we let Republicans take it from us.

**We CAN save our House Majority before it 's too late -- but not if we fail to overcome this Republican cash advantage.**

****[I can't overstate the urgency: Will you rush $3 before midnight to PROTECT our House Majority and stop Republicans from ever -- EVER -- holding power again? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)**

Nancy

name: Charles Booker
subject: This is how I start my mornings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Every morning, I start the day by waiting at the bus stop with my middle
schooler, and then I take my kindergartner to school. As I drop them off,
I tell them I love them, and wave as they walk away. After that, I get to
work for the people of Kentucky.

My three girls are my morning motivation — everything I do, I do for them.
They remind me why we’re fighting to change our politics here in Kentucky.
I love my daughters with all my heart and I’ll do anything to make sure
they grow up in a world where they feel loved, safe, and secure.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11439?refcode=em20211018-1069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1069%2E346206%2El7QhsQ ][IMG]

Everywhere I go on the campaign trail, Kentuckians share with me similar
stories. They never thought they would get involved in politics or knock
on a door, but they understand how high the stakes are for all of our
families.

I know that together, we can build a better, brighter future for everyone
in our Commonwealth.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11439?refcode=em20211018-1069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1069%2E346206%2El7QhsQ ]So if you’re ready to join us and rise up in this fight, will you
donate $5 or anything you can right now to our campaign? My
team and I rely on folks like you, reading and chipping into emails like
this, to power our grassroots movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11439?refcode=em20211018-1069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1069%2E346206%2El7QhsQ ]Contribute $5

Thanks for all you do,
Peter. Wishing you nothing but
a great week ahead.

— Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211018-1069-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1069_346206_l7QhsQ&akid=1069%2E346206%2El7QhsQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1069%2E346206%2El7QhsQ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Herschel Walker
subject: That’s a lot of cash
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |

Fellow American,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=25cf3d64296e4522821e7eb8ccdae309&_e=npYLB33vcCoaxm9olyyf39W4C09zJj8NcA5MLQSNOd_hRMLuClHb-EpAPrJ-1u9tALosJNSG8F49loc6FDTAcCz6nTw8wwKNRRgcFUUKq3eV1mDNKO-zVvFj20B3NSSH3uEUXt2bwI3EERQh760trqvGkDU_SVXfhWt0gUkraXiEMxo7AgwvSI1uAKOc3DvwwoJqthig4plfaBLqlCbf1iG5pE6e5FUWAqPW4gtEBHncvA2eiJVz6qJak52yuN48nYY1WkzV89JjOOzXV5cmBEk64DY5SOwfP0a-oWATXslLi9wv1jBdQzKbhTw9EfQ6V_fYwxdxT7hIR6A1CUaoj-lVtlzCtFBaWTBlo6_ayH4D6F_kWDr_Z9MKiZWmM9fK6N53p3QmHfrZN9ZdDfXuU_2CWlIXwP_kJk7pRpht3hvxOi3FogEplN91HwjwpUx4tpYj7stRGN-PwmG2x6KfVZ7WwZJPA5p42TYvuBSIg8g%3D)**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=25cf3d64296e4522821e7eb8ccdae309&_e=npYLB33vcCoaxm9olyyf39W4C09zJj8NcA5MLQSNOd_hRMLuClHb-EpAPrJ-1u9tALosJNSG8F49loc6FDTAcCz6nTw8wwKNRRgcFUUKq3eV1mDNKO-zVvFj20B3NSSH3uEUXt2bwI3EERQh760trqvGkDU_SVXfhWt0gUkraXiEMxo7AgwvSI1uAKOc3DvwwoJqthig4plfaBLqlCbf1iG5pE6e5FUWAqPW4gtEBHncvA2eiJVz6qJak52yuN48lORL4Hz5vTlf4290zxy26eM7SS_ittIq6U46keDht5ku3DbjXBKJzo2jNFEOBbg0pz6EdMrn9PAHH143D-SoD8EGsKHTdLTyR8sDf_ZV0ByBNlNp0mAay_UAHrnBV1-8kKKc3e8BFxw9C4I-8WIoRSk1klvcu3WrbVTOXNooz4OheS9D5w8LwU61onNCviVcaavHQlcBdrGH4TjjBX5V3NIbR4ISJ4SC2F2FCmr-fI8%3D)
Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the _entire country_ - Republican or Democrat. And he already has **$17.2 million in his campaign war chest!**

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Fellow American, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country - Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Fellow American, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: HE'S A PHONY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Enough with fake moderates |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4dbfd90d56&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, I can't stand RINOs.

But I REALLY can't stand fakes. And politics is FULL of fakes!

_As a career military guy, I am the REAL DEAL- and I have to expose a fake for you here!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=18d8765fc2&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who pretends to be a moderate!**

I guess we should call him a "trans-moderate"?

He always claims to be a moderate to this increasingly conservative district. But his actions say the opposite.

Wait until you hear what he's done this time.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d7d44d01ba&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Our Congressman, Darren Soto, signed onto a emeritus brief that is tied to the case NEW YORK STATE RIFLE & PISTOL ASSOCIATION, INC., ROBERT NASH, BRANDON KOCH, Petitioners, v. KEITH M. CORLETT, in His Official Capacity as Superintendent of New York State Police.

This case is set to go before the United States Supreme Court on November 4, 2021.

This case deals with concealed carry rights, and not only in New York! If this case is defeated, it would set a precedent to stifle concealed carry in the other 49 states.

_That's right- Darren Soto is trying to weigh in on a case in New York to impose restrictions on concealed carry rights!_

**This guy is NO moderate. He's every bit as radical as the Squad- he's just not as shrill.**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=71ce222cf4&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _I can only say it one way. Congressman Darren Soto is a leftist disguising himself as a moderate._

Sure, he keeps his “head down”, while voting “YES” for every leftist policy and spending boondoggle!

Did you know that he votes with the openly socialist “Squad” around 99% of the time? Well, he does!

"Trans-moderate".

[I need to defeat Darren Soto.](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0c893dd859&e=afa21b7626) He's an open borders Biden cheerleader. This district is trending red, and I'll be the one to flip it!

_I will stand up for America against Biden. I'll stand up for our gun rights! Darren Soto will not._

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and close the border!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ae1848313e&e=afa21b7626)

Lets put a real check on Biden. [Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8c28565776&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8e7a1c2b1a&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=17620dd803&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=29bbe7d3a6&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FgroPl0nvxU2SKnlKAPVktIj4Ap0baudGk908Vy6GRW0mb6LjIuqfrQ9xnF-YJxwBPToLsgxVg3DIcF0Wb7pDyX7d8m-9OGMlfnRVXNd31LIQg-2s7vwbPOnEANI2aJzKuG_mPxC2rJAEaHo9R8S9u7Y5OmJNKTiZwnuQ47YhsnvfKJZA8c1DxxMwDhXSylkb566i28pEweAb5SKELR_KCZigFh45YB79OEV7KPRSkzJNXzBAbQGT-Trl0ksmlW9mQ/3g9/rtnl1VYTQUS2O8hdZdlftg/h0/6yQVPUNml_X2ar8SExAH8rMAhDBt1CafNy_bpgnVx3c)
This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again.

We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true.

**[That's why we’re asking for you to split a $25 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA before our fundraising deadline comes to a close.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FgroPl0nvxU2SKnlKAPVktKTl2nC-XJPw1vS4j9FFh-YZUccgVmuECwab5O1p6Phz6QmsyBTQ0lrauOKF1MVVjJRA43kMREDDF7EsZlx7O17wD2dYileLsrPLW9dn-6bW9aZV__hyInUYq3K6IflRZfIZjuIEKw3MOrpAigG5oHsBXsOZpdh7HyF_ffbXPw6aFUXo77aOaJqT32yXmLdDP3jscr_U7aC5AuPevAL5KZWdGIG8HMVUZ6Q5bcW3Ce9pg/3g9/rtnl1VYTQUS2O8hdZdlftg/h1/0ZHRXzmlN9wNX_SZjKVykrw_UQv7cvYvz_WkbDQhsbs)**

Now, you're probably thinking how can $25 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly?

Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win.

Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. | | | This is going to be a close race. Very close. Close enough that it's important to think about what the Senate would look like if Mark Kelly loses and Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader again. We are sorry to put that terrible thought in your head, but it's true. Now, you're probably thinking how can $25 overcome the huge amount of money pouring into Arizona to beat Mark Kelly? Well, by the time you get to this part of the email someone else has already chipped in $25. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. It all adds up and that is how we win. What do you say? name: Team AOC
subject: Thank you for your small dollars, time, and spirit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You don’t have to put corporate lobbyists over people to legislate, fundraise, and win.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211018-2593-header&t=1&akid=2593%2E2526796%2EVUwb_g)
Third quarter fundraising results just came out and one thing is abundantly clear:
**Our campaign is proof that we can build powerful, grassroots movements to support and elect people to Congress free of dark money and corporate lobbyists.** Take a look:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211018?refcode=em20211018-2593-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2593_2526796_VUwb_g&akid=2593%2E2526796%2EVUwb_g)
Arizona Senator Krysten Sinema (D) is just one example of many members of Congress who take massive donations from corporate and special interest groups.1
Alexandria doesn’t spend hours calling corporate donors with deep pockets. Our fundraising numbers are proof to the old-guard in Washington that we do not have to prioritize corporate interests over real people in order to run campaigns _and win_.
With your help, Team AOC can keep growing our grassroots power and showing what’s possible when we build a campaign for and by everyday people.
[If you’re able, will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to grow our momentum and build our case for campaigns powered for and by people – not special interests?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211018?refcode=em20211018-2593-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2593_2526796_VUwb_g&akid=2593%2E2526796%2EVUwb_g)
**[Pitch in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211018?refcode=em20211018-2593-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2593_2526796_VUwb_g&akid=2593%2E2526796%2EVUwb_g)**
Every person who contributes to our campaign – whether with your small dollars, time, or spirit – is helping to create a shift in Washington.
Our fundraising numbers and volunteer power show what a campaign based on mutual aid, organizing, training, and workshops (without a cent from corporate PACs) can achieve.
Together we will continue to pave a new path in Washington, one in which we center people and pass legislation that supports working families – all without taking a dime from dark money lobbyists.

clean_body: You don’t have to put corporate lobbyists over people to legislate, fundraise, and win. Third quarter fundraising results just came out and one thing is abundantly clear: Our campaign is proof that we can build powerful, grassroots movements to support and elect people to Congress free of dark money and corporate lobbyists. Take a look: Arizona Senator Krysten Sinema (D) is just one example of many members of Congress who take massive donations from corporate and special interest groups.1 Alexandria doesn’t spend hours calling corporate donors with deep pockets. Our fundraising numbers are proof to the old-guard in Washington that we do not have to prioritize corporate interests over real people in order to run campaigns and win. With your help, Team AOC can keep growing our grassroots power and showing what’s possible when we build a campaign for and by everyday people. Every person who contributes to our campaign – whether with your small dollars, time, or spirit – is helping to create a shift in Washington. Our fundraising numbers and volunteer power show what a campaign based on mutual aid, organizing, training, and workshops (without a cent from corporate PACs) can achieve. Together we will continue to pave a new path in Washington, one in which we center people and pass legislation that supports working families – all without taking a dime from dark money lobbyists. Thank you, truly, for making this all possible. Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

clean_body: public opinion in Pennsylvania is mixed: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | what Liz Cheney said: Look, Liz Cheney is right, the January 6th Committee must investigate every minute of Trump’s actions that day. [That even means subpoenaing Trump to testify [!!!]]() So we need Pennsylvania Democrats to let us know if you support a thorough investigation into Trump’s involvement in the insurrection: | | | Your input is critical to our team. Please, respond as soon as possible. \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
